adv_u88.text: 单元 88 – 地点和运动的介词
adv_u88.note: 沿着/跨越/过去/通过——细微的差别
adv_u88.exp:
Unit 88 — 位置和移动介词。

现象：相似介词间的细微差别，对精确描述至关重要。

配对：
  • Across — 穿过表面，从一边到另一边：walk across the street/field。
  • Through — 穿过由四周围合的三维空间：walk through the forest/tunnel/crowd。
  • Along — 沿着线性物体：walk along the river/road。
  • Past — 经过：walk past the shop。
  • Towards — 朝某方向（未必到达）：walk towards the door。
  • Over — 在上方，越过障碍：jump over the fence / fly over the city。
  • Under / beneath / below — 位置细微差别。
  • Against — 物理上对立或隐喻"反对"。
示例：
  • The dog ran across the lawn. — 狗跑过草坪。
  • The river flows through the valley.
对比：above/over — 位置较高；over 也可表示"越过障碍"，而 above — 只表静态位置。
adv_u88.exc: Across = 穿过表面；through = 穿过三维内部。
mistakes: Walk across the forest → Walk through the forest.
Swim through the river → Swim across the river.
Pass by the bridge（若指"过桥"）→ Pass over the bridge.

adv_u89.note: 两个之间/许多之间 - 和例外
adv_u89.exp:
Unit 89 — between 和 among。

现象：不是机械的"二/三以上"规则，而是明确关系与模糊群体的逻辑。

规则：
  • Between — 用于明确、个体化的参与者（即使 3+）：a treaty between the three countries, choose between five options。
  • Among — 用于 3+ 的模糊群体，或焦点为归属：among the crowd, among friends。
  • Amongst — among 的文学变体。
惯用语：between you and me（你我之间），among other things（除其他之外），between a rock and a hard place（进退两难），divide X between Y and Z。

示例：
  • The disagreement between the three partners… — 三方合伙人之间的分歧。
  • She was among the finalists. — 她是决赛选手之一。
对比：divide between（各自分）与 distribute among（在群体内分配）。between 后用宾格：between you and me，不用 between you and I。
adv_u89.exc: Among 也用于两人，若是群体的一部分：among friends。
mistakes: Between three people → Among three people（通常），但明确配对时用 between。
Divide among the two of them → Divide between the two of them.
Among you and me → Between you and me.

adv_u90.note: 中午/那时/多年来/整个过程
adv_u90.exp:
Unit 90 — C1 级时间介词。

现象：扩展的时间介词集，带有细微的时长和边界含义。

高级介词：
  • Over — 在某段时间内（强调过程）：over the last decade, over the years。
  • Throughout — 贯穿始终，无一例外：throughout history, throughout the meeting。
  • Within — 在……之内（不迟于）：within 24 hours, within a week。
  • By — 到某时（期限）：by Friday。
  • Until / till — 直到某时（时长）：stay until 5。
  • Towards / toward — 接近某时期结束：towards the end of May。
  • Prior to — 之前（正式）：prior to the meeting。
  • Following — 之后（正式）：following the announcement。
示例：
  • The report must be submitted within two weeks.
  • Support grew steadily throughout the campaign.
对比：by Friday（不晚于）与 until Friday（持续）。In + 时段（in 2023）与 on + 某天（on Monday）与 at + 某点（at noon）。
adv_u90.exc: By = 到某时点；until = 直到那时（过程）。stay by 5 → stay until 5。
mistakes: Finish until Friday. → Finish by Friday.
In Monday → On Monday.
At the morning → In the morning.

adv_u91.text: 单元 91 - 介词 except 及其变体
adv_u91.exp:
Unit 91 — except 及其变体。

现象：except, except for, apart from, but, besides 的区别。

区别：
  • Except (for) — 例外：Everyone came except (for) Tom. Except for 置于句首和一般名词后更佳。
  • Apart from — 双重功能：(1) 例外 = except for；(2) 添加 = in addition to：Apart from being expensive, it's slow.
  • But 意为"除了" — 用于 all, every, no, nobody, nothing, anybody 后：nobody but me, nothing but the truth。
  • Besides — 添加（非例外）：Besides Tom, Anna also came.（Tom 来了，Anna 也来了。）
示例：
  • All the shops were open except (for) the bakery. — 所有商店都开着，除了面包店。
  • Apart from English, she speaks French. — 除英语外，她还会法语。
对比：except（排除）与 besides（添加）— 常混淆。except of, except from — 错误。
adv_u91.exc: Except for 常置于句首；except — 在 all, every, no 等概括词后的句中。
mistakes: Everyone except of Tom → Everyone except (for) Tom.
Except he is late, he is nice. → Apart from being late, he is nice.
Nobody but me knew.（口语中 "but me" 可）— 正式语体用 except (for) me。

adv_u92.text: 单元 92 - 动词后面的介词
adv_u92.exp:
Unit 92 — 动词后的介词。

现象：动词搭配特定介词；介词变化改变含义。

介词可变的动词：
  • Agree with（某人）/ agree to（提议）/ agree on（某具体事项）：I agree with you / I agreed to the plan / We agreed on Friday.
  • Talk to（与谁）/ talk about（谈何事）/ talk over（商量）。
  • Charge with（指控）/ charge for（收费）。
  • Apply to（向何处申请）/ apply for（申请某职）。
  • Consist of / in / with — 含义不同。
不带介词的动词（典型错误 — 多加介词）：discuss, enter, marry, approach, lack, reach, contact, answer, attack, attend, resemble：discuss the issue，不用 discuss about。

示例：
  • She applied for the position.
  • The success depends on effort.
对比：listen to（需介词），但 hear（不需）。Explain to me，不用 explain me — 必须带 to。
adv_u92.exc: Discuss / enter / marry / approach 不需介词：discuss about → discuss。
mistakes: Explain me this. → Explain this to me.
Listen music → Listen to music.
Depend of → Depend on.

adv_u93.text: 单元 93 - 名词后面的介词
adv_u93.note: 对的影响/原因/例外/态度
adv_u93.exp:
Unit 93 — 名词后的介词。

现象：名词与介词形成固定搭配，对 C1 级书面语尤为重要。

搭配：
  • Reason for, cause of, effect on, impact on, influence on。
  • Solution to, answer to, response to, approach to, key to。
  • Increase in, decrease in, change in, rise in, fall in。
  • Attitude to(wards), reaction to, objection to。
  • Lack of, shortage of, absence of, advantage of, disadvantage of。
  • Exception to, alternative to, access to。
  • Difference between, contrast between, connection between。
  • Relationship with, connection with, problem with, trouble with。
介词后：名词或动名词：the reason for postponing the meeting。

示例：
  • There has been a significant increase in applications.
  • We need a solution to this problem.
对比：很多母语中用同一介词的对应表达在英语中不同：中文"X 的原因" → reason for X，不用 reason of X。
adv_u93.exc: Reason for / solution to / attitude towards / increase in — 固定搭配。
mistakes: The reason of the delay → The reason for the delay.
Solution of the problem → Solution to the problem.
Attitude to him（可）/ attitude towards him — 等价；attitude against — 错误。

adv_u94.text: 单元 94 – 短语动词（两个词和三个词）
adv_u94.note: 短语动词：三成分且不可分割
adv_u94.exp:
Unit 94 — 短语动词（双词和三词）。

现象：动词与小品词的成语化组合，含义常不透明。

类型：
  • 不及物（无宾语）：break down, take off, come round。
  • 可分及物 — 名词可在小品词前后，代词只能在之间：turn the TV on / turn on the TV / turn it on，不用 turn on it。
  • 不可分及物：look after (the kids), come across (a book), get over (illness)。
  • 三词（始终不可分）：look forward to, come up with, put up with, run out of, get away with, make up for, catch up with, stand up for。
三词之后：名词或动名词：I look forward to seeing you.

语体：短语动词 — 口语化；其正式等价通常源自拉丁语：put off = postpone, look into = investigate, find out = discover。

对比：get over（恢复）与 get on with（相处）。C1 级要求主动掌握 200+ 个短语动词。
adv_u94.exc: 三词短语动词不可分：put up with him，不用 put him up with。
mistakes: Look after for the kids → Look after the kids.
I put up with it him → I put up with him.
Turn the TV on it → Turn it on. — 代词在动词和小品词之间。

adv_u95.note: 学术文本中有+扩展结构
adv_u95.exp:
Unit 95 — there is/was/has been 结构。

现象：there 作形式主语 — 引入新信息的核心工具。

基本模式：There is/are + NP + 位置/时间：There is a problem with the system.

C1 级扩展结构：
  • There appears/seems to be：There seems to be a misunderstanding.
  • There is said/believed/thought/known to be：There are believed to be several causes.
  • There is bound/likely/certain to be：There is likely to be opposition.
  • There tends to be / there happens to be / there used to be。
  • 惯用语：There is no point in doing, there is no need to, there is no way, there is no knowing/telling。
一致：与最近的名词：There is a book and two pens.

示例：
  • There's no point in arguing. — 争论无意义。
  • There have been several complaints.
对比：there 引入存在；it — 指代从句：It is reported that…，不用 There is reported…
adv_u95.exc: There is + 单数；there are + 复数。口语中：there's three of us（非标准）。
mistakes: It is a book on the table. → There is a book on the table.
There is many people. → There are many people.
There has been reported that… → It has been reported that… — 报道类用 it。

adv_u96.text: 单元 96 - 它作为正式主题（第 1 课）
adv_u96.exp:
Unit 96 — 形式主语 it（第 1 课）。

现象：it 作虚主语，使沉重从句后置 — 客观非人称语体的关键。

结构：
  • It + be + adj + that-从句：It is clear/obvious/important/likely that he's right.
  • It + be + adj + to-inf：It is important to consider all options.
  • It + be + V3 + that-从句：It is reported/said/believed/assumed that…
  • It + was + decided/agreed/arranged + that（常与 should）：It was agreed that all members should attend.
  • It + takes + 时间 + to-inf：It takes effort to learn a language.
功能：将焦点转到动作/评价，避免臃肿主语。

示例：
  • It is widely acknowledged that climate change is accelerating.
  • It is essential that everyone be informed.
语体：学术和新闻语体的基础。对比：It is（带从句）与 There is（存在）。
adv_u96.exc: It 作形式主语与 that-从句/to-inf 连用。不要与指示 it 混淆。
mistakes: Is clear that he is right. → It is clear that he is right.
That he lied is obvious（正式）. → It is obvious that he lied.
It was decided he to go. → It was decided that he should go.

adv_u97.text: 97 单元 - 它作为正式科目（第 2 课）
adv_u97.exp:
Unit 97 — 形式主语 it（第 2 课）：系动词类。

现象：在正式语体中表示结论、假设和偶然性的一组动词。

模式：
  • It seems/appears + (that-从句 / as if / as though)：It seems that he was right / It seems as if nobody cared.
  • It turns out / it emerges / it transpires + that：It turns out she was lying. — 原来她在撒谎。
  • It happens / so happens that：As it happens, I know her personally.
  • It follows that / it means that / it implies that — 结论。
  • 与 to-inf：He seems to be tired / He appears to know the answer.
示例：
  • It would seem that the plan has failed.（缓和）— 看来计划失败了。
  • It so happens that I have the key. — 恰巧我有钥匙。
语体：it transpires/emerges — 高度正式；it turns out — 中性。

对比：He seems to be tired（直接主语）与 It seems (that) he is tired（形式 it）— 同义但结构不同。
adv_u97.exc: It seems/appears + that-从句 或 to-inf：He seems to be tired / It seems that he is tired.
mistakes: It seems he to be late. → He seems to be late / It seems he is late.
It turns that he lied. → It turns out that he lied.
It happens me to know him. → I happen to know him.

adv_u98.text: Unit 98 - It 子句和what 子句
adv_u98.note: 断句：我需要的是……/是汤姆……
adv_u98.exp:
Unit 98 — 分裂句（cleft sentences）。

现象：通过重构句子突出关键信息 — 强大的修辞工具。

类型：
  • It-分裂：It + be + 焦点 + that/who-从句：It was Maria who called me（不是别人）；It was yesterday that I saw him（就是昨天）；It is precision that matters.
  • Wh-分裂（伪分裂）：What/Where/Why + 从句 + be + 焦点：What I need is a break. What she did was (to) resign.
  • 反向 wh-分裂：A break is what I need.
  • All-分裂：All I want is peace. All you have to do is call.
示例：
  • It wasn't the money that upset him — it was the principle.
  • What we need now is a new strategy.
功能：对比焦点、反驳、强调。

对比：基本句 Maria called me — 中性；It was Maria who called me — 强调 Maria。反向倒装罕见。
adv_u98.exc: 分裂结构：What I need is rest / It was Tom who broke it.
mistakes: <s>What I need is to rest and to eat</s> — 可，但注意平行结构。
It was Tom that did broke it. → It was Tom who broke it.
What I want is you come. → What I want is for you to come.

adv_u99.text: 单元 99 - 反演（第 1 课）
adv_u99.note: 我从未见过/直到那时我才意识到
adv_u99.exp:
Unit 99 — 倒装（第 1 课）。

现象：否定或限制性成分置于句首后的主谓助词倒装 — 高度正式语体的标志。

倒装触发词：
  • 否定/半否定副词：Never, Rarely, Seldom, Hardly, Scarcely, Little, Nowhere。
  • Only + 状语：Only then, only after, only by, only when, only if。
  • Not only…(but also)。
  • At no time, under no circumstances, in no way, on no account。
结构：触发成分 + 助动词 + 主语 + 实义动词（如同疑问句）：Never have I seen such chaos.

示例：
  • Rarely does one find such dedication. — 如此的敬业精神难得一见。
  • Only after the meeting did I understand. — 只有会后我才明白。
  • Not only did he arrive late, but he also forgot the papers.
语体：文学、演讲、学术。口语中显得古雅或强调。

对比：I have never seen it（中性）与 Never have I seen it（强调）。
adv_u99.exc: 否定副词引起的倒装：Never have I seen / Only then did I realise。语序同疑问句。
mistakes: Never I have seen such a thing. → Never have I seen such a thing.
Only then I realised. → Only then did I realise.
Rarely he comes.（正式）→ Rarely does he come.

el_u01.text: 第一单元 – Am、is、are 和现在简单
el_u01.note: am / is / are · 我工作，她工作
el_u01.exp:
Unit 1 — 现在时的动词 to be 和 Present Simple 的基本形式。用来描述事实、特征和习惯性动作。

结构:
  • I am / he, she, it is / we, you, they are
  • Present Simple: I/you/we/they work, he/she/it works (加词尾 -s/-es)
例子:
  • 'I am a student.' — 我是学生。
  • 'She is my sister.' — 她是我的姐妹。
  • 'They work in a bank.' — 他们在银行工作。
  • 'He speaks French.' — 他说法语。
缩写形式: I'm, he's, she's, it's, we're, they're。To be 描述状态/归属,而 Present Simple 描述规律性动作。
el_u01.exc: 代词 I 只能与 am 搭配,不能与 is/are 搭配。缩写形式: I'm, he's, she's, it's, we're, they're。在口语中 am not 不缩写(没有 amn't 形式),使用 I'm not。
mistakes: I is a student. → I am a student. — I 总是用 am。
She work every day. → She works every day. — 第三人称单数加 -s。
He are tired. → He is tired. — he/she/it 用 is。
They is happy. → They are happy. — we/you/they 用 are。

el_u02.text: 第 2 单元 – 有关 am/is/are 的问题
el_u02.note: 她是老师吗？他们准备好了吗？
el_u02.exp:
Unit 2 — 带 to be 动词的疑问句和否定句。疑问句中 am/is/are 放在主语前(倒装);否定句加 not。

结构:
  • ? Am/Is/Are + 主语 + …?
  • — 主语 + am/is/are + not …
  • 简短回答: Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
例子:
  • 'Is she a teacher?' — 她是老师吗?
  • 'Are you tired?' — 你累吗?
  • 'I am not ready.' — 我还没准备好。
  • 'Where are the keys?' — 钥匙在哪里?
缩写: isn't, aren't。疑问词(what, where, who)后紧接 is/are。
el_u02.exc: 否定的简短回答使用缩写 isn't/aren't,但肯定回答不使用缩写: Yes, I am(不是 Yes, I'm)。am 没有缩写的否定形式,要说 I'm not。
mistakes: You are a doctor? → Are you a doctor? — 疑问句中 are 放在主语前。
Yes, I'm. → Yes, I am. — 肯定的简短回答不用缩写。
Where she is? → Where is she? — 疑问词后紧接 is/are。
Is they ready? → Are they ready? — they 要用 are。

el_u03.text: 第 3 单元 – 我正在做（现在进行时）
el_u03.note: 她正在读书。他们正在工作。
el_u03.exp:
Unit 3 — Present Continuous 用于说话时或当前时段正在发生的动作。

公式: am/is/are + V-ing。
标志词: now, at the moment, right now, Look!, Listen!

例子:
  • 'I am reading a book now.' — 我现在正在读书。
  • 'She is cooking dinner.' — 她正在做晚饭。
  • 'The children are playing in the garden.' — 孩子们正在花园里玩。
  • 'Look! It is raining.' — 看!下雨了。
拼写 -ing: write→writing(去 e),sit→sitting(双写辅音),lie→lying(ie→y)。也用于暂时性情况: I am staying with my aunt this week.
el_u03.exc: 状态动词(know, like, want, love, understand, need, believe)通常不用于 Continuous。加 -ing 时: lie→lying, die→dying(ie→y); sit→sitting, run→running(双写辅音); write→writing(去 -e)。
mistakes: I am knowing the answer. → I know the answer. — 状态动词不用于 Continuous。
She is writeing a letter. → She is writing a letter. — -ing 前去 -e。
He running now. → He is running now. — 需要助动词 is。
They are siting here. → They are sitting here. — 末尾辅音双写。

el_u04.text: 第 4 单元 - 现在进行时的问题
el_u04.note: 你在工作吗？她在做什么？
el_u04.exp:
Unit 4 — Present Continuous 的疑问句和否定句。助动词 am/is/are 提前。

结构:
  • ? Am/Is/Are + 主语 + V-ing …?
  • — 主语 + am/is/are + not + V-ing …
  • 特殊疑问: Wh- + am/is/are + 主语 + V-ing?
例子:
  • 'Are you working now?' — Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
  • 'What is she doing?' — 她在做什么?
  • 'Where are the kids playing?' — 孩子们在哪里玩?
  • 'He isn't sleeping.' — 他没在睡觉。
与 Simple 不同,这里没有 do 助动词 — be 本身承担该角色。
el_u04.exc: 状态动词的疑问句不使用 Continuous: Do you know?(不是 Are you knowing?)。简短回答中只有否定形式用缩写: Yes, I am / No, I'm not。
mistakes: What you are doing? → What are you doing? — 助动词放在主语前。
Where he is going? → Where is he going? — 疑问句中不能用陈述语序。
Are you knowing him? → Do you know him? — know 不用于 Continuous。
Yes, I'm. → Yes, I am. — 肯定简短回答不用缩写。

el_u05.note: 我工作。她工作。你工作了吗？
el_u05.exp:
Unit 5 — Present Simple 用于规律性动作、习惯、普遍事实和时刻表。

公式: I/you/we/they + V1; he/she/it + V + -s/-es。
标志词: always, usually, often, sometimes, never, every day, on Mondays。

例子:
  • 'I drink coffee every morning.' — 我每天早上喝咖啡。
  • 'She works in a hospital.' — 她在医院工作。
  • 'Water boils at 100 °C.' — 水在 100°C 沸腾。
  • 'The train leaves at 6 p.m.' — 火车晚上 6 点发车。
第三人称拼写: -s/-sh/-ch/-x/-o 后 → -es(watches, goes);辅音 + y 后 → -ies(study→studies)。
el_u05.exc: 特殊的第三人称形式: go→goes, do→does, have→has。-s, -sh, -ch, -x, -o 后 → -es: watches, washes, goes。辅音 + y 后 → -ies: study→studies,但 play→plays(元音后)。
mistakes: She have a car. → She has a car. — 第三人称 have 变为 has。
He studys English. → He studies English. — 辅音 y 后变为 ies。
My brother go to school. → My brother goes to school. — o 后要用 -es。
She watch TV every evening. → She watches TV every evening. — -ch 后加 -es。

el_u06.text: 第六单元 - 一般现在时的否定（I don't）
el_u06.exp:
Unit 6 — Present Simple 的否定用 don't / doesn't。

公式:
  • I/you/we/they + do not (don't) + V1
  • he/she/it + does not (doesn't) + V1
doesn't 后实义动词失去 -s 词尾。

例子:
  • 'I don't like fish.' — 我不喜欢鱼。
  • 'She doesn't speak Chinese.' — 她不会说中文。
  • 'They don't live here.' — 他们不住这里。
  • 'My brother doesn't work on Sundays.' — 我哥哥周日不上班。
与 to be 不同,实义动词在否定句中需要助动词 do/does。
el_u06.exc: doesn't/don't 后主动词只用不定式形式 — 没有 -s 也没有过去式。口语中使用缩写;完整的 do not/does not 听起来较正式或强调。
mistakes: She doesn't works here. → She doesn't work here. — doesn't 后用不定式。
I no like coffee. → I don't like coffee. — 否定用 don't。
He don't know. → He doesn't know. — he/she/it 用 doesn't。
They doesn't speak English. → They don't speak English. — they 用 don't。

el_u07.text: 单元 7 - 现在简单的问题
el_u07.exp:
Unit 7 — Present Simple 的疑问句用 do / does。

公式:
  • ? Do/Does + 主语 + V1 …?
  • 特殊疑问: Wh- + do/does + 主语 + V1?
  • 简短回答: Yes, I do. / No, she doesn't.
例子:
  • 'Do you speak English?' — 你会说英语吗?
  • 'Does he like music?' — 他喜欢音乐吗?
  • 'Where do they live?' — 他们住在哪里?
  • 'What does she do?' — 她是做什么的?
例外: who/what 作主语时不需要助动词: Who lives here?
el_u07.exc: does 后主动词为不带 -s 的不定式。who/what 作主语时不需要助动词: Who lives here?(不是 Who does live here?)。
mistakes: Does she works? → Does she work? — does 后用不定式。
Where she lives? → Where does she live? — 需要助动词 does。
Do he like tea? → Does he like tea? — he 用 does。
Yes, I like. → Yes, I do. — 简短回答中重复助动词。

el_u08.text: 单元 8 - 一般现在时与现在进行时
el_u08.note: 我每天都工作。我现在正在工作。
el_u08.exp:
Unit 8 — Present Simple 和 Present Continuous 的比较。

Simple — 规律/永久性动作、事实: always, usually, every day。
Continuous — 说话时或暂时情况: now, at the moment, today, this week。

例子:
  • 'I usually drive to work, but today I'm taking the bus.' — 我通常开车上班,但今天坐公交。
  • 'She speaks three languages.' (事实) — 她会说三种语言。
  • 'She is speaking to her boss.' (现在) — 她正在和老板谈话。
状态动词(know, like, want, need, believe, love)即使在「现在」情况也只用 Simple。
el_u08.exc: 某些动词在 Continuous 中改变含义: I think(认为) / I'm thinking(思考); I have(拥有) / I'm having lunch(吃午饭); I see(看见) / I'm seeing him(约会)。
mistakes: I am knowing her. → I know her. — 状态动词用 Simple。
Look! He runs. → Look! He is running. — 动作正在此刻发生。
She is going to school every day. → She goes to school every day. — 规律动作用 Simple。
I am wanting a coffee. → I want a coffee. — want 不用于 Continuous。

el_u09.text: 第 9 单元 – 我已经得到了或者我已经得到了
el_u09.note: 你有车吗？ / 你有车吗？
el_u09.exp:
Unit 9 — have got 和 have 表示拥有(财产、亲属关系、疾病、外貌)。

公式:
  • 英式: I've got / she's got; ? Have you got…?; — I haven't got…
  • 美式: I have / she has; ? Do you have…?; — I don't have…
例子:
  • 'I've got two sisters.' / 'I have two sisters.' — 我有两个姐妹。
  • 'She's got blue eyes.' — 她有蓝眼睛。
  • 'Have you got a pen?' — 你有笔吗?
  • 'He doesn't have a car.' — 他没有车。
过去时只用 had(不带 got): I had a bike as a child.
el_u09.exc: 美式英语几乎不使用 have got。过去时只用 had(这个意义下没有 had got): I had a car in 2010。have 表示动作(have breakfast)时不加 got。
mistakes: Do you have got a car? → Have you got a car? 或 Do you have a car? — 不能混用结构。
I haven't a car. → I don't have a car. 或 I haven't got a car.
She has got breakfast at 8. → She has breakfast at 8. — have got = 拥有,不是动作。
He has got a headache yesterday. → He had a headache yesterday. — 过去只用 had。

el_u10.text: 第 10 单元 – Was / were（过去时）
el_u10.exp:
Unit 10 — was / were: to be 的过去时。

公式:
  • I / he / she / it + was
  • you / we / they + were
  • — wasn't / weren't; ? Was/Were + 主语…?
例子:
  • 'I was at home yesterday.' — 我昨天在家。
  • 'They were very tired.' — 他们非常累。
  • 'Was she at the party?' — 她在聚会上吗?
  • 'We weren't ready.' — 我们没准备好。
标志词: yesterday, last week, two days ago, in 2010, when I was a child。
el_u10.exc: 礼貌性表达中 I/he/she 保留 were: If I were you…。其他情况 I/he/she/it 用 was。简短否定: wasn't, weren't。
mistakes: I were at home. → I was at home. — I 过去时用 was。
They was tired. → They were tired. — they 用 were。
Was you there? → Were you there? — you 总是用 were。
She weren't happy. → She wasn't happy. — she 用 wasn't。

el_u100.text: 单元 100 - 如果：条件类型 2（第二个条件）
el_u100.note: 如果我有钱，我就会去旅行。
el_u100.exp:
Unit 100 — 第二条件句：现在/将来的非真实或极不可能条件。

表达与现实相反的想象或假设情景。

结构：If + 过去简单时, would + 不带 to 的不定式。

重要：此处过去简单时是"虚拟"过去，非真实过去时。

  • If I had a million dollars, I would travel the world. — 如果我有一百万美元，我会周游世界。（实际上没钱。）
  • If I were you, I would apologise. — 我要是你就道歉。
  • What would you do if you saw a ghost?

动词 be — 所有人称正式用 were：If he were here, he would help. 口语中允许 was，但只有 If I were you 固定不变。

主句中 would 可替换为 could, might：If I had time, I could help you.

与第一条件句区别：第一 — 真实可能（If it rains, I'll stay）；第二 — 假设，不太可能（If I had wings, I would fly）。
el_u100.exc: 正式文体中所有人称用 were：If I were you。口语中 I/he/she 用 was：If I was rich。只有 If I were you 固定不变。
mistakes: If I would have money → If I had money — would 只在主句。
If I am rich I would travel → If I were/was rich, I would travel — 条件中用过去时。
If he had time, he will help → he would help — 时态一致。
If she was you（正式）→ If she were you。

el_u101.text: 单元 101 - 相关条款，第 1 部分
el_u101.note: 打电话的人/我读过的书
el_u101.exp:
Unit 101 — 定语从句（defining relative clauses），用 who 和 that/which。

定语从句具体说明指的是哪个人或物。紧跟名词之后。

代词选择：

  • who — 人：The woman who called is my aunt. — 打电话来的女人是我姑姑。
  • that — 人和物：The man that lives next door. The book that I bought.
  • which — 只用于物：The car which I bought is red.

省略代词：

  • 若代词是从句的主语（后面直接跟动词），不能省略：The man who called me.
  • 若代词是宾语（后面跟新的主语 + 动词），可以省略：The book (that) I read was interesting.

不重复主语/宾语：不能 the man who he called — 正确 the man who called。

例：I have a friend who speaks five languages. The film (which) we saw yesterday was boring.
el_u101.exc: 若关系代词是宾语可省略：the book (that) I read。主语则不能省略：the man who called，非 the man called me。
mistakes: the man which called → the man who/that called — 人用。
the book who I read → the book that/which I read — 物用。
the woman who she lives here → the woman who lives here — 不重复主语。
the film that I saw it → the film that I saw — 不重复宾语。

el_u102.text: 单元 102 - 相关条款，第 2 部分
el_u102.exp:
Unit 102 — 定语从句的扩展：where, when, why, whose。

  • where — 地点：This is the hotel where we stayed. — 这是我们住过的酒店。
  • when — 时间：I remember the day when we met. — 我记得我们相遇的那一天。
  • why — 原因：Tell me the reason why you're late. 常省略：the reason (why) I called。
  • whose — 所属（人和物皆可）：The woman whose car was stolen called the police. The book whose cover is red.

带介词的等价形式（正式）：the house where I live = the house in which I live；the day when we met = the day on which we met。

省略规则与 Unit 101 相同：宾语可省，主语不可省。

区分：whose ≠ who's（who is / who has）。The man whose bag was stolen（其包）vs The man who's here（在这里的）。

例：I visited the village where my grandmother was born. That's the woman whose son won the prize.
el_u102.exc: Whose 人物两用：the book whose cover is torn。正式中 where 可换为 in/at which：the house in which she lives。
mistakes: the place which I was born → the place where I was born。
the day which we met（时间）→ the day when we met。
the man who's car → the man whose car — who's = who is。
the reason because → the reason why / the reason (that)。

el_u103.note: 下午 5 点 / 周一 / 3 月 / 2020 年
el_u103.exp:
Unit 103 — 时间介词 at, on, in。

按时间单位分布：

  • at — 精确时间、时间点：at 7 o'clock, at noon, at midnight, at night, at the weekend（英式）, at Christmas, at Easter, at the moment。
  • on — 日期和天：on Monday, on 5 May, on my birthday, on Christmas Day, on New Year's Eve, on a rainy day, on the morning of 1 May。
  • in — 时期：月、年、世纪、季节、一天中的部分：in January, in 2024, in the 21st century, in summer, in the morning / afternoon / evening。

重要例外：

  • at night，但 in the morning / afternoon / evening。
  • at the weekend（英式）vs on the weekend（美式）。
  • this, last, next, every, all 前介词省略：see you next Monday, last summer, every day, all day。

in 的意义 = "之后"（将来）：I'll be back in an hour. — 我一小时后回来。

例：We met on Friday at 6 o'clock in the evening.
el_u103.exc: this/that/next/last/every 前不加介词：see you next Monday（非 on next Monday）。At night，但 in the night（在夜里）。
mistakes: in Monday → on Monday — 星期。
at March → in March — 月份。
on next week → next week — 不加介词。

el_u104.text: 单元 104 – 从…到、直到、自从、为
el_u104.note: 从9点到5点/直到周五/从周一开始/持续3小时
el_u104.exp:
Unit 104 — 时间段介词：from … to, until, since, for。

from A to/till B — 指示区间：

  • I work from 9 to 5. — 我从 9 点工作到 5 点。
  • The shop is open from Monday to Friday.

until / till — "到某时为止"（动作持续并结束）：

  • Wait until Friday. — 等到周五。
  • I'll be here till 6.

since — "从某时起"（起点至今）；通常与现在完成时：

  • I've lived here since 2010. — 我自 2010 年住在这里。
  • She has been sick since Monday.

for — "持续"（时长）；任何时态：

  • I lived there for five years. — 我在那住了五年。
  • We've been waiting for two hours.

since vs for 关键对比：since + 时刻（since Monday, since 2020, since I was a child）；for + 时段（for two days, for a long time, for ages）。

相关：by + 时刻 = "不迟于"（by Friday）；before + 时刻 = "之前"（before lunch）。
el_u104.exc: Since + 时刻（since Monday），for + 时段（for two days）。Until/till 可互换；by — 到某时（by Friday = 不迟于）。
mistakes: since two hours → for two hours — 时长。
for Monday → since Monday — 起点。
I'll wait till to Friday → until Friday / till Friday — 不加 to。
from 9 till to 5 → from 9 to 5 / from 9 till 5。

el_u105.text: 单元 105 - 之前、之后、期间、同时
el_u105.note: 午餐前/下班后/电影期间
el_u105.exp:
Unit 105 — before, after, during, while 连接时间事件。

before / after 可作介词也可作连词：

  • 介词 + 名词/动名词：after dinner, before leaving。
  • 连词 + 从句：before you leave, after we had finished。
  • 时间从句中用现在时代替将来：Call me before you leave（非 before you will leave）。

during — 只作介词，在名词前（"在某事期间"）：

  • during the film, during the holidays, during lunch。
  • I fell asleep during the lecture.

while — 只作连词，在带主语和谓语的从句前：

  • while I was watching TV, while she slept。
  • He called while I was cooking.

关键对比：during + 名词；while + 整句。不能 during I slept → 只能 while I slept 或 during my sleep。

during / for 区别：during = 何时发生（during the war），for = 多长时间（for five years）。
el_u105.exc: During + 名词，while + 从句。不能 during I was reading。可以 during the meeting 或 while I was in the meeting。
mistakes: during I slept → while I slept — 动词前用 while。
while the film → during the film — 名词前用 during。
after to leave → after leaving / after I leave — 不用带 to 的不定式。
before I will go → before I go — 不加 will。

el_u106.text: 单元 106 – 地点介词：in、at、on（第 1 课）
el_u106.note: 在房间里/在门口/在桌子上
el_u106.exp:
Unit 106 — 基本地点介词 in, at, on。

in — 在有限空间/容积内：

  • in the room, in the box, in the garden, in a car, in the water, in Paris, in the sky。
  • The keys are in my bag.

on — 在表面上（上面、侧面）：

  • on the table, on the wall, on the floor, on the ceiling, on the right / left, on the first floor, on a bus / train / plane。
  • There's a picture on the wall.

at — 在一点、具体位置（不强调体积）：

  • at the door, at the bus stop, at the traffic lights, at the top / bottom, at home, at work, at the station。
  • Meet me at the entrance.

对比对：

  • in the corner（房间角）vs on the corner（街角）vs at the corner（角附近）。
  • in the bus（内部）vs on the bus（乘公交）。
  • in bed（睡觉）vs on the bed（坐床上）。
el_u106.exc: At home, at work, at school — 不加冠词。On the bus/train，但 in the car/taxi。In bed（睡觉），on the bed（坐在上面）。
mistakes: in the door → at the door — 在门旁，非里面。
on the room → in the room。
in the street corner → on the corner。
at the picture on the wall → in the picture / on the wall。

el_u107.text: 单元 107 – 地点介词：in、at、on（第 2 课）
el_u107.exp:
Unit 107 — 地点介词的固定表达（第二课）。

按组合记忆 — 逻辑并非总是字面的。

带 at：

  • at home, at work, at school, at university, at the airport, at the station, at a concert / party / meeting。
  • at the top / bottom, at the end of (the street)。

带 in：

  • in hospital, in prison, in bed（作状态）。
  • in the middle, in the front / back of (the car)。
  • in a photo, in a picture, in a book, in a newspaper, in a queue / row / line。

带 on：

  • on holiday, on business, on a trip / tour / cruise / journey。
  • on TV, on the radio, on the phone, on the internet, on the menu, on page 5, on a farm, on an island。

例：He's on holiday in Spain. I saw it on TV last night. There are three people in the picture.

对比对：in hospital（患者，英式）vs in the hospital（美式/访客）；at the end（某物末端）vs in the end（最后）。
el_u107.exc: In hospital（英式，作患者）vs in the hospital（美式或作访客）。On holiday（英式），on vacation（美式）。
mistakes: in holiday → on holiday。
at the bed（睡觉）→ in bed。
in work → at work。
on the end（最后）→ in the end（最后）/ at the end（某物末端）。

el_u108.text: 单元 108 – 地点介词：to、in、at（第 3 课）
el_u108.note: 去学校/到达伦敦/到达车站
el_u108.exp:
Unit 108 — 方向和到达介词：to, in, at。

to — 运动方向（去哪里）：

  • go to school / work / London, travel to Japan, drive to the airport, send a letter to John。

arrive — 特殊情况，不带 to：

  • arrive in + 城市/国家/大区域：arrive in London, arrive in Russia。
  • arrive at + 建筑/具体地点/事件：arrive at the station, arrive at the hotel, arrive at work, arrive at the party。

不带介词的重要例外（home — 副词）：

  • go home, come home, arrive home, get home, leave home。
  • 与 here, there 同：come here, go there。

例：

  • We arrived in Paris on Monday and arrived at our hotel in the afternoon.
  • She went home after work. — 她下班后回家了。
  • I'm going to the supermarket.

动词 get to = "到达"：How do you get to work? — 你怎么去上班？（这里 get home 也不加 to。）
el_u108.exc: Arrive in + 城市/国家，arrive at + 地点/建筑。Go home — 不加介词（home 作副词）。不能 to home。
mistakes: arrive to London → arrive in London。
arrive to the station → arrive at the station。
go to home → go home。
come in Paris → come to Paris — 方向。

el_u109.text: 单元 109 – 在下面、后面、对面和其他
el_u109.note: 桌子底下/门后/银行对面
el_u109.exp:
Unit 109 — 表示物体相对位置的介词。

  • under（在……下）/ over, above（在……上）：The cat is under the table. The lamp hangs above the desk.
  • behind（在……后）/ in front of（在……前）：A garden behind the house. He parked in front of the shop.
  • opposite（对面）：The bank is opposite the post office.
  • next to / beside / by（旁边）：She sat next to me.
  • between（在两者之间）/ among（在多者之中）：between you and me, among the trees。

细微差别：

  • above — 上方（不一定正上方）；over — 正上方、穿过：a plane flew over the city。
  • below ↔ above；under ↔ over。
  • beside（旁边）≠ besides（此外）。

复合介词要完整书写：in front of（非 in front），next to，on top of。Opposite 不加 to：opposite the bank。

例：There's a mirror above the sink. The cat is sleeping between the two cushions.
el_u109.exc: Between — 两者之间；among — 多者之中。Above（上方，不一定正上方）vs over（正上方/穿过）。Beside（旁边）≠ besides（此外）。
mistakes: between the crowd → among the crowd — 多人。
in front the house → in front of the house — 复合介词。
opposite to the bank → opposite the bank — 不加 to。
next the shop → next to the shop。

el_u11.note: 我工作过。她去了。他们看到了。
el_u11.exp:
Unit 11 — Past Simple 用于过去已完成的动作,带有明确或暗示的时间。

公式:
  • 规则动词: V + -ed(worked, played, lived)
  • 不规则动词: 特殊 V2 形式(go→went, see→saw, buy→bought, have→had)
标志词: yesterday, last Monday, two hours ago, in 1999, when I was young。

例子:
  • 'I worked late yesterday.' — 我昨天工作到很晚。
  • 'She went to Paris last summer.' — 她去年夏天去了巴黎。
  • 'We saw a great film.' — 我们看了一部很棒的电影。
  • 'He bought a new phone.' — 他买了一部新手机。
拼写: stop→stopped, study→studied, like→liked。
el_u11.exc: -ed 拼写: stop→stopped(双写),study→studied(y→i),like→liked(去 e)。不规则动词需要记忆: go→went, see→saw, buy→bought, have→had。
mistakes: She goed home. → She went home. — go 是不规则动词。
I buyed a book. → I bought a book. — buy 不规则。
He stoped the car. → He stopped the car. — 末尾辅音双写。
They studyed hard. → They studied hard. — 辅音后 y→i。

el_u110.text: 单元 110 – Up、over、through 和方向介词
el_u110.exp:
Unit 110 — 运动方向介词。

描述轨迹：

  • up（向上）/ down（向下）：walk up the hill, run down the stairs。
  • into（进入）/ out of（出来）：go into the room, get out of the car。
  • onto（到……上）/ off（离开）：jump onto the table, fall off the horse。
  • across（跨过平面）：walk across the street / the bridge。
  • through（穿过体积）：drive through the tunnel, walk through the forest。
  • along（沿着）：walk along the river。
  • past（经过）：walk past the shop。
  • round / around（环绕）：fly around the world。
  • over（越过/跳过）：jump over the fence。
  • towards（朝向）：She walked towards me.

细微区别：

  • across — 穿过平面（街道、桥、田）。
  • through — 穿过体积空间或内部（森林、隧道、人群）。

in / into 对比：in — 位置（she is in the room），into — 运动（she went into the room）。
el_u110.exc: Across — 从平面一边到另一边，through — 穿过体积（森林、隧道）。Over/above 区别：jump over（跳过），hang above（悬挂在上方）。
mistakes: through the street → across the street — 街道用 across。
across the tunnel → through the tunnel。
go in the room（运动）→ go into the room。
get out the car → get out of the car。

el_u111.note: 开车/用笔/关于问题/在电视上
el_u111.exp:
Unit 111 — 多义介词 on, at, by, with, about。

by：

  • 交通工具（不加冠词）：by car, by bus, by train, by plane, by taxi。但 on foot，不用 by foot。
  • 被动语态的施动者：written by Tolstoy。
  • 方式：by mistake, by accident, by chance, pay by credit card。

with — 工具、伴随：

  • write with a pen, cut with a knife, see with one's eyes。
  • 伴随：come with me, coffee with milk。

about — 主题：

  • talk / think / read / know / worry about：She's thinking about her future.

on — 渠道/状态：

  • on TV, on the radio, on the phone, on the internet, on holiday, on business, on a diet, on purpose。

对比对：write with a pen（工具）vs write by hand（方式）；a book about history（主题）vs a book by a historian（作者）。

例：She paid for the taxi by credit card. He hit the ball with a bat. I heard it on the radio.
el_u111.exc: By bus/car — 不加冠词；但 in my car, on the bus — 加冠词。On foot（步行），非 by foot。With/by：written by hand vs written with a pen。
mistakes: by the car → by car / in the car。
with bus → by bus。
by foot → on foot。
talk on the problem → talk about the problem。

el_u112.text: 单元 112 – 形容词 + 介词（第 1 课）
el_u112.exp:
Unit 112 — "形容词 + 介词"固定搭配。

需要与介词一起记忆。介词后接名词或动名词（-ing）。

常见搭配：

  • good / bad at：She is good at maths. He is bad at lying.
  • interested in：I'm interested in history.
  • afraid / scared of：afraid of spiders, afraid of flying。
  • sorry for / about：sorry for being late, sorry about the mistake。
  • different from：My life is different from yours.
  • similar to：Your coat is similar to mine.
  • married / engaged to：She is married to an actor.
  • proud / ashamed of：proud of her children。
  • tired of（厌倦）：tired of waiting。
  • bored with / by：bored with the lesson。
  • responsible for：responsible for the report。
  • full of：full of water。
  • famous for：famous for its cheese。

例：I'm tired of listening to him. She's really good at playing the piano.
el_u112.exc: Different from（英式/标准），different than（美式），different to（英式口语）。Afraid of + 名词/动名词：afraid of spiders, afraid of flying。
mistakes: good in math → good at math。
interested on music → interested in music。
afraid from dogs → afraid of dogs。
married with her → married to her。

el_u113.text: 单元 113 – 动词 + 介词（第 2 课）
el_u113.exp:
Unit 113 — "动词 + 介词"固定搭配（prepositional verbs）。

介词与动词不可分，决定含义。介词后接名词或动名词。

关键搭配：

  • listen to：listen to music / to the teacher。（但 hear 不加介词：I heard a noise.）
  • wait for：wait for the bus / for you。
  • look at（看），look for（找），look after（照顾），look forward to（期待）。
  • talk / speak to / with + somebody；talk about（关于某事）。
  • think of / about：What do you think of my idea?
  • depend on：It depends on the weather.
  • belong to：This pen belongs to me.
  • apply for（a job）：申请。
  • believe in，happen to，pay for，ask for，laugh at。

疑问句中介词通常留在句末：Who are you waiting for? What are you talking about?

对比对：look at（看）/ look for（寻找）/ look after（照顾）/ look up（查词典）。
el_u113.exc: Listen to 总是加 to，但 hear — 不加介词：I heard the noise。Look for（寻找）≠ look at（看着）≠ look after（照顾）。
mistakes: listen music → listen to music。
wait you → wait for you。
look the picture → look at the picture。
depend of → depend on。

el_u114.text: 单元 114 - 短语动词（第 1 课）
el_u114.note: 打开/关闭、穿上/脱下、起床
el_u114.exp:
Unit 114 — 短语动词引入：动词 + 短小副词（particle）改变原始含义。

基础例：

  • turn on / off — 开/关：Turn on the TV.
  • put on / take off — 穿上/脱下：Put on your coat.
  • get up — 起床：I get up at 7.
  • sit down, stand up, lie down — 坐下、起立、躺下。
  • wake up — 醒来。
  • give up — 放弃（习惯）：She gave up smoking.
  • look up — 查词典。
  • write down — 记下。

可分 vs 不可分：

  • 可分短语动词中名词既可在动词和副词之间，也可放后面：turn the TV off = turn off the TV。
  • 代词（it, them, him）总在中间：turn it on，非 turn on it；take them off。

例：Can you turn the light off? → Turn it off. I took off my shoes = I took my shoes off.
el_u114.exc: 代词作宾语时置于动词和副词之间：turn it on，非 turn on it。名词则任选顺序。
mistakes: turn on it → turn it on — 代词居中。
I put on my coat on → I put on my coat / I put my coat on。
get up from bed（意为"醒来"）→ get up 不带介词。
Take off them → Take them off。

el_u115.text: 单元 115 - 短语动词（第 2 课）
el_u115.exp:
Unit 115 — 续：更复杂和习语化的短语动词。

常见表达：

  • break down — 坏掉（设备）：My car broke down.
  • carry on (with) — 继续：Carry on working.
  • find out — 查明、弄清：I found out the truth.
  • give up — 放弃、屈服：Don't give up!
  • go on — 继续/发生：What's going on?
  • look forward to — 期待。to 后接动名词：I'm looking forward to seeing you.
  • run out of — 用完：We ran out of milk.
  • set off / set out — 出发：We set off early.
  • get on with — 相处融洽：She gets on well with her boss.
  • take off — 起飞（飞机）。
  • turn up / turn down — 调大/调小音量或出现/拒绝。

不及物（无宾语）：break down, set off, go on。及物常带必需介词：run out of sugar, look forward to the weekend。例：We set off at dawn and broke down on the motorway. I look forward to meeting you soon.
el_u115.exc: Look forward to — to 后总是动名词，非不定式：looking forward to seeing you。Run out of — 宾语前必需 of：We ran out of milk。
mistakes: I look forward to see you → I look forward to seeing you — 动名词。
find out the truth out → find out the truth / find the truth out。
The car broke（表故障）→ The car broke down。
run out milk → run out of milk — 必需 of。

el_u12.text: 第 12 单元 - 一般过去时：疑问句和否定句
el_u12.exp:
Unit 12 — Past Simple 通过助动词 did 构成疑问句和否定句。

公式:
  • ? Did + 主语 + V1 …?
  • — 主语 + didn't + V1 …
  • 特殊疑问: Wh- + did + 主语 + V1?
did / didn't 后动词用不定式,不用 V2。

例子:
  • 'Did you see him?' — 你见过他吗?
  • 'She didn't come to the party.' — 她没来聚会。
  • 'Where did they go?' — 他们去了哪里?
  • 'What did he say?' — 他说了什么?
to be 不需要助动词: Were you there?
el_u12.exc: to be 不需要助动词 did: Were you tired?(不是 Did you be tired?)。who/what 作主语时: Who called? 不用 did。
mistakes: Did she went home? → Did she go home? — did 后用不定式。
I didn't saw him. → I didn't see him. — didn't 后用不定式。
Where you went? → Where did you go? — 需要 did。
Did he was there? → Was he there? — to be 不用 did。

el_u13.text: 第 13 单元 - 过去进行时
el_u13.note: 她打电话时我正在读书。
el_u13.exp:
Unit 13 — Past Continuous 用于过去某一时刻或时段正在进行的动作。

公式: was/were + V-ing。

例子:
  • 'At 8 p.m. yesterday I was watching TV.' — 昨天晚上 8 点我正在看电视。
  • 'They were having dinner when I arrived.' — 我到的时候他们正在吃晚饭。
  • 'What were you doing at 10?' — 你 10 点在做什么?
  • 'She wasn't listening.' — 她没在听。
常作为 Past Simple 动作的背景: 持续动作(Continuous)被短动作(Simple)打断。状态动词通常用 Past Simple。
el_u13.exc: 状态动词(know, like, want)不用于 Past Continuous。-ing 拼写规则相同: lie→lying, run→running, write→writing。
mistakes: I was knowing the answer. → I knew the answer. — 状态动词用 Simple。
She were reading. → She was reading. — she 用 was。
They was playing football. → They were playing football. — they 用 were。
What you were doing? → What were you doing? — 必须倒装。

el_u14.text: 第 14 单元 - 一般过去时与过去进行时
el_u14.exp:
Unit 14 — Past Simple vs Past Continuous。

Past Simple — 短暂已完成动作: He called me.
Past Continuous — 持续的动作: I was cooking.

连词:
  • when + Past Simple — 打断的瞬间
  • while + Past Continuous — 并行或背景持续动作
例子:
  • 'I was cooking when he called.' — 他打电话时我正在做饭。
  • 'While she was reading, the baby was sleeping.' — 她读书时,宝宝在睡觉。
  • 'When he arrived, we started dinner.' — 他到时我们开始吃晚饭。
两个 Simple 连续 = 顺序动作;Continuous + Simple = 打断。
el_u14.exc: 如果过去有两个连续的短动作,两部分都用 Past Simple: When he arrived, she made coffee(= 到达后)。比较: When he arrived, she was making coffee(= 已经在做)。
mistakes: While I cooked, he called. → While I was cooking, he called. — while + 持续动作。
When the phone rang, I watched TV. → When the phone rang, I was watching TV. — 背景动作用 Continuous。
I was falling asleep at 10 p.m. → I fell asleep at 10 p.m. — 瞬间动作用 Simple。
She was knowing the truth. → She knew the truth. — 状态动词不用于 Continuous。

el_u15.text: 第 15 单元 - 现在完成时
el_u15.note: 我已经做到了。她已经走了。
el_u15.exp:
Unit 15 — Present Perfect: 过去动作与当前时刻的联系(结果、经验、变化)。

公式: have/has + V3(过去分词)。

例子:
  • 'I have lost my keys.' — 我丢了钥匙(还没找到)。
  • 'She has broken her arm.' — 她摔断了胳膊(现在还疼)。
  • 'We have finished the project.' — 我们完成了项目。
  • 'He has gone home.' — 他回家了(他不在这里)。
V3: go→gone, see→seen, do→done, write→written, make→made。强调当前结果,而不是何时发生。
el_u15.exc: yesterday, last week, ago, in 2010 不用 Present Perfect — 只用 Past Simple。美式英语常在英式英语使用 Present Perfect 的地方用 Past Simple: Did you eat? / Have you eaten?
mistakes: I have seen him yesterday. → I saw him yesterday. — yesterday 用 Past Simple。
She has went home. → She has gone home. — go 的第三形式是 gone。
They have finish the work. → They have finished the work. — 需要 V3/-ed 形式。
He have lost his keys. → He has lost his keys. — he 用 has。

el_u16.text: 第 16 单元 – 现在完成时：刚刚、已经、还
el_u16.note: 我刚吃过饭。你完成了吗？
el_u16.exp:
Unit 16 — just, already, yet 与 Present Perfect 连用。

  • just — 刚刚(肯定): I've just seen him.
  • already — 已经,比预期早(肯定): She has already left.
  • yet — 还(否定)/ 已经(疑问),置于句尾: Have you finished yet? / I haven't finished yet.
例子:
  • 'They've just arrived.' — 他们刚到。
  • 'I've already eaten.' — 我已经吃过了。
  • 'Has the postman come yet?' — 邮递员来过了吗?
just/already 位于 have 和 V3 之间;yet 在句尾。
el_u16.exc: Yet 置于句尾;just/already 位于助动词和实义动词之间。美式英语中 just/already 可与 Past Simple 连用: I just ate。
mistakes: I have yet finished. → I haven't finished yet. — yet 用于否定/疑问。
She already has left. → She has already left. — already 在 has 和 V3 之间。
Have you finished already?(中性疑问)→ Have you finished yet? — 疑问句通常用 yet。
I have just ate. → I have just eaten. — 需要 V3 形式。

el_u17.text: 第 17 单元 – 现在完成时：你曾经……吗？
el_u17.exp:
Unit 17 — Present Perfect 与 ever / never 连用谈论人生经验。

公式: Have/Has + 主语 + ever + V3…?

例子:
  • 'Have you ever been to Japan?' — 你去过日本吗?
  • 'I have never tried sushi.' — 我从没吃过寿司。
  • 'She has never flown on a plane.' — 她从没坐过飞机。
  • 'It's the best film I've ever seen.' — 这是我看过的最好的电影。
been vs gone: He has been to Rome(去过并回来了)vs He has gone to Rome(去了还在那里)。Never 是唯一的否定词,不需要第二个 not。
el_u17.exc: Have you been to…? — 去过并回来了;Have you gone to…? — 去了还在那里。Never 已经是否定词,不需要第二个否定: I have never been(不是 I haven't never been)。
mistakes: Have you ever went to Paris? → Have you ever been to Paris? — Perfect 中用 V3 been。
I haven't never tried it. → I have never tried it. — 英语中单一否定。
She has gone to Rome twice. → She has been to Rome twice. — 谈经验用 been。
Did you ever eat sushi? → Have you ever eaten sushi? — 经验用 Present Perfect。

el_u18.text: 第 18 单元 - 现在完成进行时
el_u18.note: 我已经工作了3个小时了。
el_u18.exp:
Unit 18 — Present Perfect Continuous 用于从过去开始一直持续到说话时刻的动作(或刚刚结束且有明显结果)。

公式: have/has + been + V-ing。

例子:
  • 'I have been waiting for an hour.' — 我已经等了一个小时。
  • 'She has been studying all day.' — 她学习了一整天。
  • 'It has been raining since morning.' — 从早上开始一直下雨。
  • 'Your eyes are red — have you been crying?' — 你眼睛红了 — 你哭过吗?
常与 for, since, all day, how long 连用。状态动词用 Present Perfect Simple: I have known him for years.
el_u18.exc: 状态动词(know, love, have)用 Present Perfect Simple,不用 Continuous: I have known him for years(不是 I have been knowing)。
mistakes: I am working here for 3 years. → I have been working here for 3 years.
She has been knowing him since 2010. → She has known him since 2010. — 状态动词。
How long you have been waiting? → How long have you been waiting? — 必须倒装。
He has been write a book. → He has been writing a book. — 需要 -ing 形式。

el_u19.text: 第 19 单元 – 自始至终；前
el_u19.exp:
Unit 19 — since, for, ago 表达时间。

  • for + 时间段: for two hours, for a week, for years
  • since + 起始时刻: since Monday, since 2010, since I was a child
  • ago 在时间段之后 — 与 Past Simple 连用: two days ago
例子:
  • 'I have lived here for 10 years.' — 我住在这里 10 年了。
  • 'She has worked here since January.' — 她从一月开始在这里工作。
  • 'He arrived two hours ago.' — 他两小时前到达。
For/since — 与 Present Perfect (Continuous) 连用;ago — 只与 Past Simple 连用,不与 Perfect 连用。
el_u19.exc: Ago 只与 Past Simple 连用,并置于时间段之后: two years ago。Since 可引导整个从句: since I was a child。
mistakes: I have lived here since 5 years. → I have lived here for 5 years. — 时段用 for。
She has worked here for 2010. → She has worked here since 2010. — 起点用 since。
I saw him since two days ago. → I saw him two days ago. — ago 不带介词。
He has arrived two hours ago. → He arrived two hours ago. — ago 用 Past Simple。

el_u20.text: 第 20 单元 – 现在完成时与一般过去时
el_u20.note: 我见过。 / 我昨天看到了。
el_u20.exp:
Unit 20 — Present Perfect 和 Past Simple 的比较。

Present Perfect — 与现在相关,不指定时间: I have seen that film.
Past Simple — 已完成动作且指明时间: I saw it yesterday.

例子:
  • 'I have been to London.' (经验) vs 'I went to London in 2018.' (事实)
  • 'She has just called.' (关联) vs 'She called an hour ago.' (过去)
  • 'Have you finished?' (到现在) vs 'Did you finish on time?'
标志词 yesterday, last week, in 2020, ago, when — 只用 Past Simple。today, this week, this morning(时段尚未结束)— 用 Present Perfect。
el_u20.exc: 指定具体过去时间(yesterday, last year, in 1990, when I was young)只用 Past Simple。today, this week, this morning(时段仍在持续)— 用 Present Perfect。
mistakes: I have seen this film last week. → I saw this film last week.
She went to Paris. She loves it.(如果最近回来且联系重要)→ She has been to Paris.
Did you finish your work yet? → Have you finished your work yet?(英式)— yet 用 Perfect。
When have you arrived? → When did you arrive? — when 指具体时刻用 Past Simple。

el_u21.exp:
Unit 21 — Present 和 Past Simple 中的被动语态,当重要的是动作而非执行者时。

公式:
  • Present: am/is/are + V3
  • Past: was/were + V3
  • 执行者通过 by 引入。
例子:
  • 'English is spoken all over the world.' — 英语在全世界被使用。
  • 'The letter was written by Anna.' — 这封信是安娜写的。
  • 'My car was stolen last night.' — 我的车昨晚被偷了。
  • 'These cakes are made every morning.' — 这些蛋糕每天早上做。
不及物动词(happen, arrive, come, die)不用于被动语态。
el_u21.exc: 不及物动词(happen, come, arrive, die)不用于被动。某些动词构成被动不寻常: born → be born(I was born in 1990)。
mistakes: The book was wrote by him. → The book was written by him. — 需要 V3 形式。
The accident was happened yesterday. → The accident happened yesterday. — happen 不用被动。
I am born in Moscow. → I was born in Moscow. — born 用过去时。
English speaks in many countries. → English is spoken in many countries.

el_u22.text: Unit 22 - 不同时态的被动语态
el_u22.note: 已被制造/已被制造/将被制造
el_u22.exp:
Unit 22 — 被动语态在各种时态和情态动词中的用法。

公式:
  • Present Cont.: is/are being + V3
  • Present Perfect: has/have been + V3
  • Past Cont.: was/were being + V3
  • Future: will be + V3
  • 情态: can/must/should + be + V3
例子:
  • 'The house is being built.' — 房子正在被建造。
  • 'The letter has been sent.' — 信已经被寄出。
  • 'It will be finished tomorrow.' — 这明天会完成。
  • 'This must be done today.' — 这必须今天完成。
原则: 只变 be 部分,V3 保持不变。
el_u22.exc: Continuous Passive: is being done / was being done。Perfect Passive: has been done / had been done。情态: can be done, must be done, should be done。
mistakes: The house is build now. → The house is being built now. — Continuous Passive。
The letter has wrote. → The letter has been written. — Perfect Passive: has been + V3。
It must done today. → It must be done today. — 情态动词后 be + V3。
The car will repaired. → The car will be repaired. — 将来时: will be + V3。

el_u23.text: 第 23 单元 – 助动词 BE、DO、HAVE
el_u23.note: 我在做什么/你在/有你吗
el_u23.exp:
Unit 23 — 三个关键助动词: be, do, have。

  • be — 构成 Continuous(is working)和 Passive(is made)
  • do/does/did — Simple 的疑问和否定(Do you know? I don't know)
  • have/has/had — Perfect 时态(has done, had seen)
例子:
  • 'She is reading.' — Continuous。
  • 'Do you like tea?' — Simple 疑问。
  • 'They have arrived.' — Perfect。
  • 'The door was opened.' — Passive。
助动词的选择取决于时态/结构。Simple 肯定句通常不需要 do(除了强调: I do like it!)。
el_u23.exc: Present/Past Simple 中助动词 do/did 只出现在疑问和否定句;肯定句不用: I work(不是 I do work,除非强调)。
mistakes: Does she can swim? → Can she swim? — 情态动词不用 do。
I do work here every day.(作为中性)→ I work here every day.
Have you going? → Are you going? — Continuous 需要 be。
Do you been there? → Have you been there? — Perfect 需要 have。

el_u24.text: 第 24 单元 – 规则动词和不规则动词
el_u24.note: 工作→工作/去→去/采取→采取
el_u24.exp:
Unit 24 — 规则动词和不规则动词。

规则动词: V2 和 V3 加 -ed(work-worked-worked)。
不规则动词: 有特殊的 V1/V2/V3 形式,需要记忆。

常见不规则动词:
  • go – went – gone
  • see – saw – seen
  • take – took – taken
  • write – wrote – written
  • buy – bought – bought
  • have – had – had
例子:
  • 'I worked yesterday.' (规则)
  • 'She has taken my book.' (不规则)
V2 用于 Past Simple;V3 用于 Perfect 时态和 Passive。
el_u24.exc: 某些动词有两种形式: learn→learned/learnt, dream→dreamed/dreamt。read 的形式拼写相同但读音不同: [riːd] → [red] → [red]。
mistakes: I goed to school. → I went to school. — go 不规则。
She has eated dinner. → She has eaten dinner. — eat 的 V3 是 eaten。
They taked my bag. → They took my bag. — take 的 V2 是 took。
He has writed a letter. → He has written a letter. — V3 是 written。

el_u25.text: Unit 25 – Present Continuous for the future
el_u25.exp:
Unit 25 — Present Continuous 表示已安排的将来事件(有具体时间/地点的约定)。

公式: am/is/are + V-ing + 将来标志词。

例子:
  • 'I am meeting John tomorrow.' — 我明天和约翰见面。
  • 'She is flying to Rome next week.' — 她下周飞罗马。
  • 'We are having dinner with them on Saturday.' — 我们周六和他们一起吃晚饭。
  • 'What are you doing this evening?' — 你今晚做什么?
对比: 时刻表(火车、课程)用 Present Simple(The train leaves at 7);即兴决定用 will;意图用 going to。
el_u25.exc: 时刻表事件(火车、电影)用 Present Simple: The train leaves at 6。Present Continuous — 有具体约定的个人计划。
mistakes: I meet him tomorrow. → I'm meeting him tomorrow. — 个人计划。
The train is leaving at 8 every day. → The train leaves at 8 every day. — 时刻表。
I will meet her tomorrow(已有约定时)→ I'm meeting her tomorrow.
She is flying to Paris.(没有将来标志词)→ She is flying to Paris next week.

el_u26.text: 第 26 单元 – 去（要做）
el_u26.note: 我要去学习。她要下雨了。
el_u26.exp:
Unit 26 — 结构 be going to 表示意图和基于可见迹象的预测。

公式: am/is/are + going to + V1。

例子:
  • 'I'm going to learn Spanish.' — 我打算学西班牙语。
  • 'They are going to move to Berlin.' — 他们打算搬到柏林。
  • 'Look at those clouds — it's going to rain!' — 看那些云 — 要下雨了!
  • 'She is going to have a baby.' — 她要生孩子了。
与 will 对比: going to — 预先考虑好的决定;will — 即兴决定。常 going to go 简化为 going to + 地点: I'm going to the shop.
el_u26.exc: Going to go 常被 going to 替换: I'm going to the shop(代替 going to go to)。口语中 going to 读作 gonna(非正式)。
mistakes: I going to study. → I'm going to study. — 需要助动词 am/is/are。
She is going to studies. → She is going to study. — to 后用不定式。
Look! It will rain.(看到云)→ Look! It's going to rain. — 根据可见迹象。
He is going to go to London. → He is going to London. — 避免重复。

el_u27.text: 单元 27 - 简单将来时（意志）
el_u27.note: 我会帮助你。天气将会晴朗。
el_u27.exp:
Unit 27 — Future Simple 用 will 表示即兴决定、提议、承诺、预测和未来事实。

公式: will + V1(不带 to)。否定: won't。

例子:
  • 'I'll help you with the bags.' (当下决定) — 我帮你拿包。
  • 'I promise I'll call.' — 我保证我会打电话。
  • 'It will be sunny tomorrow.' — 明天会晴天。
  • 'She won't be late.' — 她不会迟到。
在时间/条件从句 when, if, before, after, until 后不用 will: When I arrive, I'll call you.
el_u27.exc: Will 不用于时间和条件从句(when, if, before, after): When I arrive, I will call(不是 When I will arrive)。否定缩写: won't。
mistakes: When I will see him, I'll tell him. → When I see him, I'll tell him.
I will to help you. → I will help you. — will 后用不带 to 的不定式。
She willn't come. → She won't come. — 缩写是 won't。
Will you helping me? → Will you help me? — will 后用不定式。

el_u28.text: 第 28 单元 – 意愿和应当
el_u28.note: 你会帮忙吗？我要打开窗户吗？
el_u28.exp:
Unit 28 — 情态动词 will 和 shall。

Will — 将来、承诺、请求: Will you help me?
Shall — 现代语言中主要用于 I/we 的提议: Shall I…? / Shall we…?

例子:
  • 'Shall I open the window?' — 要我开窗吗?
  • 'Shall we go for a walk?' — 我们去散步好吗?
  • 'Will you pass the salt, please?' — 请把盐递给我。
  • 'I shall never forget this day.' (正式) — 我永远不会忘记这一天。
情态动词后接不带 to 的不定式。现代英语中 shall 几乎不与 he/she/they 连用。
el_u28.exc: Shall I…? / Shall we…? — 只用于 I/we 的提议。肯定句中 shall 过时且听起来正式。Will you…? 可以是请求或关于将来的问题。
mistakes: Shall he come? → Will he come? — shall 不与 he/she/they 连用。
I shall to help. → I shall help. — 情态动词后用不带 to 的不定式。
Shall I to open the window? → Shall I open the window?
Will I help you?(作为提议)→ Shall I help you? — 自我提议。

el_u29.text: 第 29 单元 – 可能和可能
el_u29.note: 可能会下雨。她可能在家。
el_u29.exp:
Unit 29 — may 和 might 表示可能性(或许/可能)。

公式: may/might + V1。Might 通常表示较低的把握,但现代口语中两者常可互换。

例子:
  • 'It may rain later.' — 稍后可能下雨。
  • 'She might be at home.' — 她可能在家。
  • 'I might go to the party.' — 我可能会去聚会。
  • 'They may not come.' — 他们可能不来。
May 也可表示正式许可: May I come in? 否定: may not / might not(没有缩写 mayn't)。
el_u29.exc: May 也可以表示许可(正式): May I come in? Might 几乎不用于此义。两者后都接不带 to 的不定式。
mistakes: She may to come. → She may come. — 不带 to。
He mights know. → He might know. — 情态动词不加 -s。
It may rains tomorrow. → It may rain tomorrow. — may 后用不定式。
Do you may help me? → May I help you? — 不用 do。

el_u30.text: 第 30 单元 - 可以和可以
el_u30.exp:
Unit 30 — can 和 could 表示能力、可能性、许可和请求。

Can — 现在的能力/许可: I can swim. Can I sit here?
Could — 过去的能力和礼貌请求: I could read at 5. Could you help me?

例子:
  • 'She can speak three languages.' — 她会说三种语言。
  • 'Can you help me?' — 你能帮我吗?
  • 'When I was young, I could run fast.' — 我年轻时跑得很快。
  • 'Could you repeat, please?' — 请您重复一下好吗?
can 没有将来形式 — 用 will be able to。情态动词后接不带 to 的不定式。
el_u30.exc: Can 没有将来形式 — 用 will be able to。Past could 描述一般能力;具体成功情况用 was/were able to 或 managed to。
mistakes: She cans swim. → She can swim. — 情态动词不加 -s。
I can to drive. → I can drive. — 不带 to。
He will can help. → He will be able to help. — can 没有将来形式。
Do you can help? → Can you help? — 不用 do。

el_u31.text: 第31单元-必须，不可以，不需要
el_u31.note: 你必须停下来。你不用担心。
el_u31.exp:
Unit 31 — must, mustn't, needn't。

  • must — 强烈的必要性/义务: You must stop at the red light.
  • mustn't — 禁止: You mustn't smoke here.
  • needn't(= don't need to / don't have to)— 不必要: You needn't come early.
例子:
  • 'I must finish this report today.' — 我今天必须完成这份报告。
  • 'Children mustn't play with matches.' — 孩子不准玩火柴。
  • 'You needn't worry about it.' — 你不必担心。
must/mustn't/needn't 后接不带 to 的不定式。Must 表达确信的推论: She must be tired.
el_u31.exc: Mustn't = 禁止(不能);don't have to / needn't = 不必要(可以不)。must 没有过去式 — 用 had to。
mistakes: You mustn't come — it's not necessary. → You don't have to come.
She musts go. → She must go. — 情态动词不加 -s。
I must to leave. → I must leave. — 不带 to。
He musted wait. → He had to wait. — 过去用 had to。

el_u32.exp:
Unit 32 — should 用于建议、推荐和意见(应该/最好做)。

公式: should + V1。否定: shouldn't。疑问: Should I…?

例子:
  • 'You should see a doctor.' — 你应该去看医生。
  • 'He shouldn't drive so fast.' — 他不应该开这么快。
  • 'Should I call her?' — 我该给她打电话吗?
  • 'We should leave now.' — 我们该走了。
should 比 must 弱: 是建议,不是命令。常与 I think 连用: I think you should apologize. should 后接不带 to 的不定式。
el_u32.exc: 否定 shouldn't = 不应该。强建议用 ought to(同义)。Should have + V3 — 对过去的遗憾(本应该做)。
mistakes: You should to see a doctor. → You should see a doctor. — 不带 to。
He shoulds study more. → He should study more.
Do I should go? → Should I go? — 不用 do。
She should went there. → She should have gone there. — 对过去的遗憾。

el_u33.note: 我必须工作。她必须离开。
el_u33.exp:
Unit 33 — have to / has to 表示来自外部的义务或必要性(规则、情况)。

公式:
  • Present: have to / has to + V1
  • Past: had to + V1
  • ? / — : 用 do/does/did: Do you have to…? / I don't have to…
例子:
  • 'I have to work on Saturday.' — 我周六得上班。
  • 'She has to wear a uniform.' — 她得穿制服。
  • 'Did you have to pay?' — 你得付钱吗?
  • 'I don't have to get up early tomorrow.' — 我明天不用早起。
Don't have to = 不必要(与 mustn't = 禁止不同)。
el_u33.exc: 与 must 不同,have to 有所有形式: had to, will have to, have had to。疑问和否定用 do/does/did: Do you have to…?
mistakes: She have to work. → She has to work. — 第三人称用 has。
I haven't to go. → I don't have to go. — 否定用 don't。
Have you to leave? → Do you have to leave? — 疑问用 do。
He must to work yesterday. → He had to work yesterday. — 过去用 had to。

el_u34.exp:
Unit 34 — would 用于礼貌请求、提议、假设情况和过去习惯。

主要用法:
  • 礼貌请求: Would you pass me the salt?
  • 提议/愿望: I would like a coffee.
  • 假设: I would travel more if I had money.
  • 过去习惯: When I was a child, I would play in the park.
例子:
  • 'Would you like some tea?' — 要喝点茶吗?
  • 'I'd love to come.' — 我很乐意来。
  • 'He would always help his friends.' — 他总是帮助朋友。
缩写: 'd。would 后接不带 to 的不定式。
el_u34.exc: Would you like…? — 提议(想要什么?);Do you like…? — 关于一般喜好的问题。would like 后接带 to 的不定式: I'd like to go。
mistakes: Do you would like tea? → Would you like tea? — 不用 do。
I would like going. → I would like to go. — would like 后用不定式。
Would you like some tea?(问一般喜好)→ Do you like tea?
She would likes coffee. → She would like coffee. — 情态动词后不加 -s。

el_u35.exp:
Unit 35 — 祈使句(Imperative)用于命令、请求、指令和建议。

公式:
  • 肯定: V1 + …(Sit down!)
  • 否定: Don't + V1(Don't worry!)
  • 与 let's 连用 — 共同行动的提议: Let's go!
例子:
  • 'Open the window, please.' — 请开窗。
  • 'Don't be late.' — 别迟到。
  • 'Let's have lunch together.' — 我们一起吃午饭吧。
  • 'Turn left at the corner.' — 在拐角处左转。
祈使句针对 you,但代词省略。为了更礼貌加 please。
el_u35.exc: Let's = 共同行动的提议;否定 — Let's not go(不是 Don't let's go)。礼貌请求加 please,但不是必需的。
mistakes: You sit down! → Sit down! — 祈使句中主语省略。
No smoke here! → Don't smoke here! — 否定用 don't。
Let's to go. → Let's go. — 不带 to。
Don't be to late. → Don't be late. — 不带 to。

el_u36.note: 我以前住在那里。她以前抽烟。
el_u36.exp:
Unit 36 — used to 描述过去存在但现在不再重复的习惯性动作和状态。

公式:
  • 肯定: used to + V1
  • 否定: didn't use to + V1
  • 疑问: Did + 主语 + use to + V1?
例子:
  • 'I used to smoke, but I quit.' — 我以前抽烟,但戒了。
  • 'She used to live in London.' — 她以前住在伦敦。
  • 'Did you use to play football?' — 你以前踢足球吗?
  • 'He didn't use to like coffee.' — 他以前不喜欢咖啡。
只用于过去;现代没有 use to 的对应形式 — 现在习惯用 Present Simple 加 usually。
el_u36.exc: 否定和疑问中 used to 变为 use to: didn't use to, did you use to…? 不要与 be used to + -ing(习惯于)和 get used to 混淆。
mistakes: I used to living there. → I used to live there. — used to 后用不定式。
She didn't used to smoke. → She didn't use to smoke. — did 后用 use。
I am used to live here.(指「以前住」)→ I used to live here.
He use to play football. → He used to play football. — 肯定句用 used。

el_u37.exp:
Unit 37 — 结构 there is / there are 表示某事物的存在或具有。

公式:
  • there is + 单数: There is a book on the table.
  • there are + 复数: There are two chairs.
  • 否定: there isn't / there aren't (any)
  • 疑问: Is there…? / Are there…?
例子:
  • 'There is a cat in the garden.' — 花园里有一只猫。
  • 'There are many people here.' — 这里人很多。
  • 'Is there a bank near here?' — 附近有银行吗?
  • 'There isn't any milk.' — 没有牛奶。
按结构后的第一个名词一致: There is a book and two pens.
el_u37.exc: 动词与距离它最近的名词一致: There is a book and two pens / There are two pens and a book。缩写: there's(there're 少见)。
mistakes: Is a book on the table. → There is a book on the table. — 需要 there。
There are a cat here. → There is a cat here. — 单数用 is。
It is a problem(指「存在」)→ There is a problem.
There is many people. → There are many people. — 复数用 are。

el_u38.text: 单元 38 – 曾经/将会/曾经
el_u38.exp:
Unit 38 — there 在其他时态中: there was/were, there will be, there has/have been。

形式:
  • Past: there was / there were
  • Future: there will be
  • Perfect: there has been / there have been
  • 情态: there might be, there must be
例子:
  • 'There was a party yesterday.' — 昨天有个聚会。
  • 'There were many guests.' — 有很多客人。
  • 'There will be a meeting tomorrow.' — 明天将有会议。
  • 'There has been an accident.' — 发生了事故。
与名词一致: was/has been + 单数;were/have been + 复数。
el_u38.exc: there will be(不是 there will have)。there 后可接情态动词: there must be, there might be, there should be。
mistakes: There will a party. → There will be a party. — 需要 be。
There was many people. → There were many people. — 复数用 were。
It was a problem yesterday(存在)→ There was a problem yesterday.
There have been a mistake. → There has been a mistake. — 单数用 has。

el_u39.text: 单元 39 – 正式主题 it
el_u39.exp:
Unit 39 — 形式主语 it 用于表示时间、天气、距离、温度和非人称结构。

用法:
  • 时间: It is 7 o'clock.
  • 日期/星期: It is Monday.
  • 天气: It is raining.
  • 距离: It is 5 km to the station.
  • 评价: It is difficult to learn Chinese.
例子:
  • 'It is cold today.' — 今天冷。
  • 'It takes an hour to get there.' — 到那里要一小时。
  • 'It is nice to see you.' — 很高兴见到你。
与 there 对比: there is = 存在/有;it is = 它是/情况。
el_u39.exc: It 用于天气、时间、距离,但不能替换实际主语: It is raining,不是 The weather is raining。
mistakes: Is cold today. → It is cold today. — 需要形式主语 it。
Is 5 o'clock. → It is 5 o'clock.
The weather is raining. → It is raining.
How long it takes? → How long does it take? — 需要 does。

el_u40.text: 第 40 单元 - 助动词简答
el_u40.note: 是的，我愿意。 / 不，她不是。 / 我也是。
el_u40.exp:
Unit 40 — 助动词的简短回答和应答(避免重复完整动词)。

原则: 简短回答重复与问题时态对应的助动词/情态动词。

例子:
  • 'Do you like tea?' — 'Yes, I do. / No, I don't.'
  • 'Is she coming?' — 'Yes, she is. / No, she isn't.'
  • 'Can you swim?' — 'Yes, I can.'
  • 'Have you seen it?' — 'Yes, I have.'
应答中原则相同: I live in Moscow. — Do you? / Oh, really?;She can drive. — Can she? 这样可以表达兴趣或惊讶而不必完整重复。
el_u40.exc: So do I = 同意肯定陈述;Neither do I / Nor do I = 同意否定陈述。必须倒装: So + 助动词 + 主语。
mistakes: Yes, I like. → Yes, I do. — 重复助动词。
Me too.(回应「I don't like it」后)→ Me neither. 或 Neither do I.
So I do. → So do I. — 倒装。
Yes, she's. → Yes, she is. — 简短回答中不用缩写。

el_u41.text: 第 41 单元 – 标签问题
el_u41.note: 这很好，不是吗？你没有去，是吗？
el_u41.exp:
Unit 41 — 反意疑问句(tag questions)— 用于澄清、同意或获取确认的简短「附加」。

规则: 肯定陈述后接否定附加,否定陈述后接肯定附加。使用相同的助动词。

例子:
  • 'You are a teacher, aren't you?' — 你是老师,对吗?
  • 'She doesn't smoke, does she?' — 她不抽烟,对吧?
  • 'They have arrived, haven't they?' — 他们到了,是吧?
  • 'You can swim, can't you?' — 你会游泳,对吧?
I am 的附加是 aren't I? 祈使句的附加是 will you? / won't you?
el_u41.exc: I am → aren't I?;Let's → shall we?;祈使句 → will you? / won't you?。nobody/no one/nothing 后附加为肯定: Nobody came, did they?
mistakes: She is a doctor, is she? → She is a doctor, isn't she? — 肯定陈述后用否定。
You don't like it, do you like it? → You don't like it, do you?
I'm late, amn't I? → I'm late, aren't I?
Let's go, will we? → Let's go, shall we?

el_u42.text: Unit 42 – Too, either, so, neither, nor
el_u42.exp:
Unit 42 — too, either, so, neither/nor 表达同意或类同(「也/也不」)。

规则:
  • 肯定 + too / so: I am tired. — Me too. / So am I.
  • 否定 + either / neither: I don't like it. — Me neither. / Neither do I.
  • 语序: So/Neither + 助动词 + 主语。
例子:
  • 'I can swim.' — 'So can I.'
  • 'She isn't hungry.' — 'Neither am I.'
  • 'He likes jazz, and I do too.'
  • 'They haven't finished. — Nor have we.'
so/neither 回答中的助动词应与原句对应。
el_u42.exc: So/Neither 需要倒装;too/either — 陈述语序。Either — 与否定连用,too — 与肯定连用。
mistakes: I like tea. So I do. → I like tea. So do I.
I'm tired too.(回应「I'm tired」— 正确,但 I'm tired either.)→ I'm tired too.
I don't know. Me too. → Me neither. / Neither do I.
Neither do I like it. → I don't like it either. 或 Neither do I.

el_u43.text: 单元 43 – 否定句，助词 not
el_u43.exp:
Unit 43 — 否定句和小品词 not。

主要方式:
  • to be: am/is/are + not(isn't, aren't)
  • 情态动词: can't, won't, mustn't, shouldn't
  • Simple: don't / doesn't / didn't + V1
  • Perfect: haven't / hasn't / hadn't + V3
例子:
  • 'She isn't at home.' — 她不在家。
  • 'I don't like coffee.' — 我不喜欢咖啡。
  • 'We haven't seen him.' — 我们没见过他。
  • 'He won't come.' — 他不会来。
英语中一句只有一个否定: never, nobody, nothing 不加第二个 not。
el_u43.exc: 英语中不允许双重否定: I don't know anything(不是 I don't know nothing)。nobody/nothing/never 后动词用肯定形式。
mistakes: I don't know nothing. → I don't know anything.
She no likes coffee. → She doesn't like coffee.
He isn't never late. → He is never late.
They haven't no money. → They don't have any money. / They have no money.

el_u44.text: 第 44 单元 - 问题词顺序
el_u44.note: 她为什么离开？你要去哪里？
el_u44.exp:
Unit 44 — 疑问句的词序: 助动词置于主语前(倒装)。

公式:
  • 一般: Aux + S + V + …?
  • 特殊: Wh- + aux + S + V + …?
Simple 的助动词是 do/does/did;Continuous 是 be;Perfect 是 have;情态动词是其自身。

例子:
  • 'Where do you live?' — 你住在哪里?
  • 'What is she doing?' — 她在做什么?
  • 'Have they arrived?' — 他们到了吗?
  • 'Can he swim?' — 他会游泳吗?
陈述句语序: S + V;疑问句用助动词倒装。
el_u44.exc: 如果问主语(who/what = 主语),不用助动词: Who lives here?
mistakes: Why she left? → Why did she leave?
Where you are going? → Where are you going?
What she does? → What does she do?
When you will come? → When will you come?

el_u45.text: 单元 45 – 对主题提出问题（谁/什么）
el_u45.exp:
Unit 45 — 主语提问用 who / what。当疑问词替代主语时,保持陈述语序,不需要助动词 do/did。

公式: Who/What + V (+ …)?

例子:
  • 'Who lives here?' — 谁住在这里?
  • 'What happened?' — 发生了什么?
  • 'Who called you?' — 谁给你打的电话?
  • 'What is in the box?' — 盒子里是什么?
比较: Who did you call?(宾语 — 需要 did)vs Who called you?(主语 — 不用 did)。动词通常用第三人称单数。
el_u45.exc: 当 who/what/which 是主语时,Present Simple 中动词用第三人称单数: Who likes tea?(不是 Who do like tea?)。
mistakes: Who did break the window? → Who broke the window? — 不用 did。
What did happen? → What happened?
Who do live here? → Who lives here?
What does make you happy? → What makes you happy?

el_u46.text: 单元 46 – 带介词的问题
el_u46.note: 你和谁说话了？它是做什么用的？
el_u46.exp:
Unit 46 — 带介词的疑问句。英语中介词通常留在疑问句末(不前置)。

公式: Wh- + aux + S + V … + 介词?

例子:
  • 'Who are you waiting for?' — 你在等谁?
  • 'What is she talking about?' — 她在说什么?
  • 'Where do you come from?' — 你从哪里来?
  • 'Who did you go with?' — 你和谁一起去?
正式用法(With whom did you go?)听起来书面化。口语规范是介词放句尾。介词取决于动词: listen to, wait for, look at, talk about。
el_u46.exc: 介词通常留在疑问句末: Who are you talking to? 介词前置的正式版本: To whom are you talking? — 口语中几乎不用。
mistakes: With who did you go? → Who did you go with?
At what are you looking?(口语)→ What are you looking at?
For what is it? → What is it for?
About what are you thinking? → What are you thinking about?

el_u47.text: 单元 47 – 关于什么、哪些、如何的问题
el_u47.exp:
Unit 47 — 疑问词 what, which, how。

  • what — 开放选择: What is your name?
  • which — 在有限范围中选择: Which colour do you prefer, red or blue?
  • how — 方式、状态;与形容词/副词连用: how old, how far, how often
例子:
  • 'What time is it?' — 几点了?
  • 'Which bus goes to the centre?' — 哪辆公交去市中心?
  • 'How are you?' — 你好吗?
  • 'How old is your brother?' — 你弟弟多大?
What kind of…? — 种类;How many / How much — 数量(可数/不可数)。
el_u47.exc: What — 开放选择;Which — 有限范围中选择。How many — 可数名词,How much — 不可数名词和价格。
mistakes: How many water do you drink? → How much water do you drink?
How much books do you have? → How many books do you have?
What of these shirts do you like?(从两个中选)→ Which of these shirts do you like?
How long time does it take? → How long does it take?

el_u48.text: 第 48 单元 – 需要多长时间？
el_u48.exp:
Unit 48 — 结构 How long does it take…? 用于询问动作持续时间。

公式: How long does it take (+ someone) + to + V1?

例子:
  • 'How long does it take to get to the airport?' — 到机场要多久?
  • 'It takes 20 minutes by bus.' — 坐公交 20 分钟。
  • 'How long did it take you to learn English?' — 你学英语花了多长时间?
  • 'It took me three years.' — 我花了三年。
过去 — How long did it take…?;将来 — How long will it take…? 注意: it — 形式主语。
el_u48.exc: 注意语序: It takes + (宾语) + 时段 + to + 不定式: It takes me 20 minutes to get there。过去 — It took…
mistakes: How long it takes? → How long does it take?
It takes 20 minutes for go there. → It takes 20 minutes to go there.
It take me an hour. → It takes me an hour.
How long did it took? → How long did it take?

el_u49.text: 第 49 单元 – 问题和从属条款
el_u49.exp:
Unit 49 — 间接(嵌入)疑问句和从句: 在 Do you know…, Can you tell me…, I wonder… 等表达后,词序变为陈述句语序,助动词 do/did 消失。

公式: Do you know + wh- + S + V …?

例子:
  • 'Do you know where she lives?' — 你知道她住哪里吗?
  • 'Can you tell me what time it is?' — 你能告诉我几点了吗?
  • 'I wonder why he is late.' — 我想知道他为什么迟到。
  • 'I don't know if/whether she will come.' — 我不知道她会不会来。
是/否疑问用 if / whether。
el_u49.exc: 间接疑问句用陈述语序(不倒装),不用 do/does/did。是/否疑问用 if/whether。
mistakes: Do you know where does she live? → Do you know where she lives?
Tell me what is it. → Tell me what it is.
I don't know is he coming. → I don't know if he is coming.
Can you tell me where did he go? → Can you tell me where he went?

el_u50.text: 第 50 单元 - 报告演讲
el_u50.exp:
Unit 50 — 间接引语(Reported Speech): 转述他人的话。从直接引语转为间接引语时,动词时态通常后移一级(backshift),代词/时间指示也改变。

时态后移:
  • Present Simple → Past Simple
  • Present Cont. → Past Cont.
  • Present Perfect → Past Perfect
  • Past Simple → Past Perfect
  • will → would; can → could
例子:
  • 'I am tired,' she said. → She said (that) she was tired.
  • 'I will call you.' → He said he would call me.
  • 'We have finished.' → They said they had finished.
改变: today→that day, tomorrow→the next day, here→there, this→that。
el_u50.exc: 众所周知的事实不「后移」: He said the Earth is round。情态动词 would, could, might, should 不变。Must → had to(表义务)。
mistakes: She said she is tired. → She said she was tired.
He said he will call. → He said he would call.
They said me that… → They told me that… / They said (that)…
She said that today is Monday.(事后转述)→ She said that that day was Monday.

el_u51.text: 单元 51 - 不定式和带 -ing 的动词
el_u51.exp:
Unit 51 — 在其他动词后选择不定式(to + V)和动名词/ V-ing 形式。

这些动词后通常 V-ing: enjoy, finish, stop, mind, suggest, avoid, practise, keep。
这些后接 to + V: want, need, decide, hope, promise, learn, plan, offer。

例子:
  • 'I enjoy reading.' — 我喜欢读书。
  • 'She wants to leave.' — 她想走。
  • 'They decided to move.' — 他们决定搬家。
  • 'He finished writing.' — 他写完了。
介词后总是 V-ing: good at swimming, instead of working.
el_u51.exc: stop 后意义改变: stop to smoke(停下来去抽烟)vs stop smoking(戒烟)。remember/forget/try 类似。
mistakes: I enjoy to swim. → I enjoy swimming.
She wants going home. → She wants to go home.
He decided going. → He decided to go.
I finished to work. → I finished working.

el_u52.text: 单元 52 - 不定式和动名词（续）
el_u52.note: 他同意提供帮助。她喜欢读书。
el_u52.exp:
Unit 52 — 允许两种形式(to + V 或 V-ing)的动词,有时意义改变。

无差别: like, love, hate, start, begin, continue, prefer(I like swimming / I like to swim)。
有差别:
  • remember to do — 记得去做(将来)vs remember doing — 记得做过
  • stop to do — 停下来去做 vs stop doing — 停止做
  • try to do — 尝试 vs try doing — 试试某方法
例子:
  • 'I remembered to lock the door.' — 我没忘记锁门。
  • 'I remember meeting him.' — 我记得见过他。
  • 'He stopped smoking.' — 他戒烟了。
el_u52.exc: 介词后总是动名词: good at swimming, afraid of flying, instead of going。介词后不能用不定式。
mistakes: She is good at to sing. → She is good at singing.
I'm interested in to learn French. → I'm interested in learning French.
He told me go. → He told me to go.
Thanks for to help. → Thanks for helping.

el_u53.text: 单元 53 - make 和 let 后的不定式
el_u53.note: 她让我哭了。他让我走了。
el_u53.exp:
Unit 53 — make 和 let 后接不带 to 的不定式。

公式:
  • make somebody do — 使某人做
  • let somebody do — 允许/让某人做
例子:
  • 'She made me wait.' — 她让我等。
  • 'My parents don't let me stay out late.' — 父母不让我在外面待到很晚。
  • 'Let me help you.' — 让我帮你。
  • 'The teacher made us work hard.' — 老师让我们努力学习。
被动语态中 make 接 to: I was made to wait. let 没有被动形式 — 用 allowed to: We were allowed to leave.
el_u53.exc: make/let/hear/see/feel/watch 主动态后接不带 to 的不定式。但被动态 make 要接 to: I was made to work。
mistakes: She made me to cry. → She made me cry.
He let me to go. → He let me go.
I saw him to leave. → I saw him leave.
They made me working late. → They made me work late.

el_u54.text: 单元 54 - 表示目的的不定式
el_u54.note: 我来这里是为了学习。她工作是为了赚钱。
el_u54.exp:
Unit 54 — 目的不定式: to + V1 回答「为什么?」「为了什么?」。

公式: … + to + V1 (+ …)。更正式的变体: in order to, so as to。

例子:
  • 'I went to the shop to buy milk.' — 我去商店买牛奶。
  • 'She is learning English to get a better job.' — 她学英语是为了找更好的工作。
  • 'He called me to say goodbye.' — 他打电话来道别。
  • 'We stopped to rest.' — 我们停下来休息。
否定目的: in order not to / so as not to(I left early so as not to be late.)。For + V-ing 表示物品用途: a knife for cutting bread.
el_u54.exc: 目的用带 to 的不定式或结构 in order to / so as to 表达。否定目的: so as not to / in order not to(不是 for not to)。
mistakes: I came here for learn English. → I came here to learn English.
She works for earning money. → She works to earn money.
He went to shop for to buy bread. → He went to the shop to buy bread.
I whispered for not to wake him. → I whispered so as not to wake him.

el_u55.text: 单元 55 – 动词 go：继续、去做、去做
el_u55.exp:
Unit 55 — 动词 go 在固定表达和搭配中。

常见模式:
  • go + V-ing — 表示活动种类: go shopping, go swimming, go skiing, go fishing
  • go for + 名词: go for a walk, go for a drink, go for a swim
  • go to + 地点: go to school, go to work, go to the cinema
  • go on — 继续: Go on talking.
例子:
  • 'Let's go swimming.' — 我们去游泳吧。
  • 'We went for a walk in the park.' — 我们去公园散步。
  • 'She goes to university by bus.' — 她坐公交去大学。
  • 'Go on — I'm listening.' — 继续说 — 我在听。
el_u55.exc: go 表示活动时后接不带冠词的动名词: go swimming。go for 后通常有冠词: go for a walk, go for a coffee。
mistakes: I go to swimming every week. → I go swimming every week.
Let's go for walk. → Let's go for a walk.
She went on a holiday.(英式)→ She went on holiday.
We go to shop.(购物)→ We go shopping.

el_u56.exp:
Unit 56 — 多功能动词 get。

主要意义:
  • 得到: I got a letter.
  • 变得(+ 形容词): It's getting dark. She got angry.
  • 到达: How do you get to work?
  • 拿/买: I'll get some bread.
  • 短语动词: get up, get on, get off, get in, get out, get back
例子:
  • 'I got a present.' — 我收到一个礼物。
  • 'He is getting old.' — 他在变老。
  • 'We got home at 10.' — 我们 10 点到家。
  • 'Get off the bus here.' — 在这里下车。
Get + V3 口语中常 = 被动: He got hurt.
el_u56.exc: Get + 形容词 = 变得(变化)。Get to + 地点 = 到达。home, here, there 前不需要介词: get home。
mistakes: I get to home at 7. → I get home at 7.
She got tiredly. → She got tired. — get 后用形容词。
He is getting to angry. → He is getting angry.
I got the bus.(「上了公交」意义 — 正确,但「到达」意义: I got to the station.)

el_u57.text: 单元 57 - do 和 make 之间的区别
el_u57.exp:
Unit 57 — do 和 make 的区别。

Do — 表示动作、义务、不具体的活动: do homework, do the washing, do a job, do exercise, do your best.
Make — 表示创造、生产、结果: make breakfast, make a cake, make a mistake, make a decision, make noise.

例子:
  • 'I do my homework every evening.' — 我每晚做作业。
  • 'She is making a cake.' — 她在做蛋糕。
  • 'He made a mistake.' — 他犯了错误。
  • 'Don't make noise.' — 别吵。
固定搭配需要记忆: do a favour, make a phone call, do business, make friends.
el_u57.exc: Do — 一般动作(工作、义务);make — 创造新事物。需记忆: do a favour, do one's best, make a phone call, make a decision。
mistakes: I must make my homework. → I must do my homework.
She did a mistake. → She made a mistake.
Can you do me a photo? → Can you take me a photo? / take a photo of me.
He did a decision. → He made a decision.

el_u58.text: 单元 58 – 固定表达方式中的动词 have
el_u58.exp:
Unit 58 — have 在固定表达中: 动作动词(不是拥有),have 替代一系列动作。

常见表达: have breakfast/lunch/dinner, have a shower/bath, have a rest/break, have a holiday, have a swim, have a drink, have a good time, have a look, have a dream, have a party, have a baby.

例子:
  • 'I usually have breakfast at 8.' — 我通常 8 点吃早餐。
  • 'She had a shower.' — 她洗了澡。
  • 'Let's have a break.' — 我们休息一下吧。
  • 'We had a great time in Italy.' — 我们在意大利玩得很开心。
这些表达中 have 像普通实义动词: 疑问/否定用 do/does/did。
el_u58.exc: 这些表达中 have 是实义动词,所以疑问和否定用 do/does/did: Do you have breakfast?(不是 Have you breakfast?)。Have got 不用于这些表达。
mistakes: I have got breakfast at 8. → I have breakfast at 8.
Have you lunch? → Do you have lunch?
She is having brown hair. → She has brown hair. — 拥有,不是动作。
Let's make a party. → Let's have a party.

el_u59.note: 我/我，他/他，她/她，我们/我们，他们/他们
el_u59.exp:
Unit 59 — 人称代词: 主格和宾格。

主格(主语): I, you, he, she, it, we, you, they。
宾格(宾语): me, you, him, her, it, us, you, them。

例子:
  • 'I love her.' — 我爱她。
  • 'She knows me.' — 她认识我。
  • 'They invited us.' — 他们邀请了我们。
  • 'Give it to him.' — 把它给他。
宾格用于动词和介词后: with me, for her, to them。简短回答/应答中常用宾格: Who's there? — Me!
el_u59.exc: 介词后总是宾格: for me, with him, to us。口语中 than, as 后也用宾格: taller than me。
mistakes: She saw I. → She saw me. — 动词后用宾格。
Give it to I. → Give it to me.
Him is my brother. → He is my brother. — 主语。
Me and her went. → She and I went. — 主语用主格。

el_u60.text: 第 60 单元 – 所有格代词（我的/我的）
el_u60.exp:
Unit 60 — 物主形容词和物主代词: my/mine, your/yours, his/his, her/hers, its/—, our/ours, their/theirs。

区别:
  • 物主形容词置于名词前: my book。
  • 物主代词替代名词词组: This book is mine.
例子:
  • 'This is my car. That car is yours.' — 这是我的车。那辆车是你的。
  • 'Her dress is beautiful. Hers is blue.' — 她的裙子很漂亮。她的是蓝色的。
  • 'Our house is big; theirs is small.' — 我们的房子大;他们的小。
  • 'Is this pen yours or his?' — 这支笔是你的还是他的?
名词的所有格: Mary's book, the children's toys.
el_u60.exc: Its(物主,它的)不带撇号;it's = it is/has。名词前用形容词(my),不带名词用代词(mine)。
mistakes: This book is my. → This book is mine.
Mine car is new. → My car is new. — 名词前用 my。
The dog hurt it's leg. → The dog hurt its leg. — 物主不带撇号。
A friend of me. → A friend of mine.

el_u61.text: 单元 61 – 我 – 我的 – 我的（表）
el_u61.exp:
Unit 61 — 英语人称代词所有形式的总表。

英语代词有五种形式：主格（作主语）、宾格（作宾语）、物主形容词（名词前）、物主代词（不带名词）和反身代词。

  • I / me / my / mine / myself — 我 / 我（宾）/ 我的 / 我的（独立）/ 我自己
  • he / him / his / his / himself；she / her / her / hers / herself
  • we / us / our / ours / ourselves；they / them / their / theirs / themselves
  • you / you / your / yours / yourself(ves)；it / it / its / — / itself

例：I gave him my pen; his is blue; he hurt himself.（我把我的笔给了他；他的是蓝色的；他弄伤了自己。）形式的选择取决于在句中的角色：主语 → I，动词或介词之后 → me，名词前 → my，替代名词 → mine，返回到主语 → myself。
el_u61.exc: his 形式对于物主形容词和物主代词是相同的：his book / This book is his。it 没有反身形式 itselves — 只有 itself。
mistakes: This is mine book → This is my book / This book is mine — 不带名词时用 mine。
Me and John went → John and I went — 主语需要主格，并且"我"要放在最后。
Give it to I → Give it to me — 介词后只能用宾格。

el_u62.exp:
Unit 62 — 在连贯话语中巩固代词所有格形式的实践练习。

格的规则：在介词之后以及作直接/间接宾语时，始终使用宾格形式（me, him, her, us, them），即使两个代词用 and 连接也是如此。

  • She invited John and me. — 她邀请了约翰和我。
  • Between you and me, it's a secret. — 我们私下说，这是个秘密。
  • It's me at the door. — 是我在门口。（口语规范；正式用法为 It is I）
  • He is taller than I am / than me. — 他比我高。

在 than/as 之后，口语中使用宾格（taller than me），正式文体中用主格加动词（than I am）。在强调结构 It is/was … who 中，主语代词用主格：It was she who called.
el_u62.exc: 口语中可以说 It's me / It's him，虽然语法上"正确"的是 It is I。在 than/as 之后，口语中用 taller than me，正式文体用 taller than I (am)。
mistakes: between you and I → between you and me — 介词 between 之后只能用宾格。
Her and me are friends → She and I are friends — 主语需要主格。
Us students work hard → We students work hard — 代词与其在句中的角色一致。

el_u63.note: 我自己，我自己，我自己，我自己
el_u63.exp:
Unit 63 — 反身代词 -self/-selves，当动作指向动作者本身时使用。

形式：myself, yourself, himself, herself, itself, ourselves, yourselves, themselves。当主语和宾语是同一个人时使用，也可用于加强语气（亲自）。

结构：

  • 反身含义：She cut herself with a knife. — 她用刀划伤了自己。
  • 强调：I did it myself. — 我自己做的。
  • 介词后：He lives by himself. — 他独自生活。
  • Help yourself to some cake! — 请随意吃蛋糕！

常与反身代词连用的标志性动词：hurt, cut, enjoy, blame, teach, introduce, look at。固定短语 by myself/yourself… = "独自、一个人"。比较 each other（互相）：They looked at themselves（在镜中——各自看自己）vs They looked at each other（互相看）。
el_u63.exc: you 有两种形式：yourself（单数）和 yourselves（复数）。地点介词之后通常不用反身代词：She closed the door behind her（不用 herself）。
mistakes: I wash myself every morning → I wash every morning — 与 wash, shave, dress 连用时通常不需要反身代词。
Themself → themselves — 复数形式总是以 -selves 结尾。
She and me did it ourself → She and I did it ourselves — "我们"用 ourselves。
Meet me at my self house → Meet me at my house — myself 不能替代 my。

el_u64.note: 汤姆的车。女孩的名字。我父母的房子。
el_u64.exp:
Unit 64 — 用 's 撇号构成的名词所有格。

表示人或生物的所有关系。结构：所有者 + 's + 所属物。

  • 单数：Tom's car, the girl's book, my brother's friend — 汤姆的车，女孩的书，我哥哥的朋友。
  • 以 -s 结尾的复数：只加撇号 — my parents' house, the students' exams。
  • 不规则复数：按常规加 's — children's toys, women's rights, men's clothes。
  • 场所（省略）：at the doctor's, to the hairdresser's, at Tom's — 在医生那里，去理发店，在汤姆家。

对于无生命物体，更倾向使用 of 结构：the door of the car, the roof of the house。但对于组织、国家、时间段，两种用法都可接受：the company's policy, today's news, a week's holiday。双重所有格 — a friend of mine / a friend of Tom's。
el_u64.exc: 双重所有格：a friend of mine（不用 a mine friend）。无生命物体多用 of：the roof of the house，但组织可用 — the company's policy。
mistakes: the car of Tom → Tom's car — 人物多用 's。
the childrens' toys → the children's toys — children 已是复数，撇号在 s 之前。
its' color → its color — its 从不加撇号。
James car → James's car / James' car — 撇号是必须的。

el_u65.text: 单元 65 – 不定冠词 a/an
el_u65.note: 一本书、一个苹果、一所大学、一个小时
el_u65.exp:
Unit 65 — 不定冠词 a/an 用在单数可数名词前。

含义："众多中的一个"、首次提及、分类、职业、类别泛指。

形式选择取决于发音，而非字母：

  • a — 辅音音素前：a book, a car, a university [juː]，a European, a one-way street [w]。
  • an — 元音音素前：an apple, an hour（h 不发音），an honest man, an MP [em-piː]。

典型用法：

  • 职业：She is a teacher. — 她是教师。
  • 首次提及：I saw a dog in the park. — 我在公园看见一只狗。
  • 泛指：A cat is a mammal. — 猫是哺乳动物。
  • 感叹句：What a surprise!

不用于不可数名词（water, music）和复数 — 这些情况用 some 或零冠词。
el_u65.exc: 按音选择，不按字母：a university, a European, a one-way street（/j/, /w/ 音）；an hour, an honest man, an MP（h 不发音或字母读音为元音）。
mistakes: an university → a university — 以 /juː/ 音开头。
a hour → an hour — h 不发音，音为元音。
She is doctor → She is a doctor — 单数职业前需要冠词。
a advice → 不可数，some advice — 不能用 a。

el_u66.exp:
Unit 66 — 名词复数形式的构成。

基本规则：+ -s。词尾的变化取决于单词的结尾。

  • 标准：book → books, cat → cats。
  • 以 -s, -ss, -sh, -ch, -x, -o 结尾：+ -es — bus → buses, box → boxes, tomato → tomatoes。
  • 辅音 + -y → -ies：city → cities, story → stories。元音 + -y → 仅加 -s：boy → boys。
  • -f/-fe → -ves：leaf → leaves, knife → knives, wife → wives。

不规则形式（需记忆）：man → men, woman → women, child → children, foot → feet, tooth → teeth, mouse → mice, person → people。

单复数形式相同：sheep, fish, deer, aircraft, series, species。例：I saw three deer. — 我看见了三只鹿。pluralia tantum（只有复数形式）：trousers, jeans, scissors, glasses — 与复数动词连用。
el_u66.exc: 单复数同形：sheep, fish, deer, aircraft, series。只有复数：trousers, jeans, scissors, glasses, clothes。拉丁语来源：analysis→analyses, crisis→crises, phenomenon→phenomena。
mistakes: childrens → children — 已是复数形式。
two sheeps → two sheep — 形式不变。
my trouser is → my trousers are — 此词恒为复数。
womans → women — 元音交替。

el_u67.exp:
Unit 67 — 不可数（uncountable）名词：没有复数形式，也不与 a/an 搭配。

包括物质、抽象概念和集合名词：water, milk, bread, money, time, music, love, advice, information, news, furniture, luggage, work, weather, traffic。

动词用单数：The news is bad. — 消息不好。Your advice was helpful. — 你的建议很有帮助。

表示数量/份量 — 用 of 结构：

  • a piece of advice / news / furniture — 一个建议/一条消息/一件家具。
  • a glass of water, a cup of tea, a slice of bread, a bar of chocolate。
  • some / any / much / a little / a lot of + 不可数：some milk, much time, a little sugar。

有些词可作可数或不可数，意义不同：a paper（报纸）/ paper（纸）；a coffee（一杯咖啡）/ coffee（咖啡这种产品）；an experience（一次经历）/ experience（经验）。
el_u67.exc: 有些词可作可数或不可数，意义不同：a hair（一根头发）/ hair（头发）；a paper（报纸）/ paper（纸）；a coffee（一杯咖啡）/ coffee（咖啡饮料）。
mistakes: an advice / advices → a piece of advice / some advice — 不可数。
informations → information — 不加 -s。
a news → some news / a piece of news — 虽然以 -s 结尾，但是单数不可数。
furnitures → furniture — 集合不可数。

el_u68.note: 一些水，一些建议，一些音乐
